subject: We need you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:
Will you step up?

| [](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=4bc952b9302e4043850a490fa3a9c004&_e=ovZvFW6RJ81bjPEoqcPOOJXnhF4LMZKzTetQ0eETjo14T7MVI0gcNwHfwl2QB1BFpvmP3kh7X7RD-fwpP6ojpm0ed07ev_OKo_z5ju19xRErkNFisIvTaB42lVSiv8pFnckcWsgnc1-WX6ugTz5eGo1g4Jr76wgPK45xZX2e-I6_eyutBrCknQWfI8WC4r92NQ3nWSPXr0-dCNNJd85GV7S5Yxo2u4DG1L0j4HpCtPXFvl7tq89POTWypA8xlAN-bYulKZxJzzafeivSd9Dqu8ueoXPtd1gRsEPlOf1A4ZCtXQxGhB9kaiu1o4rg_Vitn_5MqhMAQUG9LWlVOeZI4BF_vbQn754jlZE-O-sDdRxhwV5aXgiu-unbh79NfPDSyGDB5i8QsWTsPI7AKW987RweCohhSbQ0IuICXoztKoWiSq-4pKo23kCLFuJjq4wUs2Z7nYOi98TkQqk0ln6xci4LdoFPu2ahxNZCT2M9AMs%3D)
---

Patriot,

Senator Braun is working every day to stop Socialism and preserve the American dream for the next generation. But he can’t do it alone - **Mike needs strong Conservative patriots to support him in his fight against the Radical Left.**

That’s why we have set an ambitious goal to get **200 new donors by the end of the month! Are you in?** | [**COUNT ME IN!**](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=4bc952b9302e4043850a490fa3a9c004&_e=ovZvFW6RJ81bjPEoqcPOOJXnhF4LMZKzTetQ0eETjo14T7MVI0gcNwHfwl2QB1BFpvmP3kh7X7RD-fwpP6ojpm0ed07ev_OKo_z5ju19xRErkNFisIvTaB42lVSiv8pFnckcWsgnc1-WX6ugTz5eGo1g4Jr76wgPK45xZX2e-I6_eyutBrCknQWfI8WC4r92NQ3nWSPXr0-dCNNJd85GV7S5Yxo2u4DG1L0j4HpCtPXFvl7tq89POTWypA8xlAN-KJTqq7ibfotfAELYkGOF1pZhTu89ubLKOfuvUGgJ5PpwSpbG3YKVRNVrNWGPXbzvVPQ4ur7olFYxFiyTxqOHTHY5e3sCwmmiB3DB8aJJsf90PQfeFEiVQM-EKmzD77pwK9KvtNbZFL9ZvIF9duh_lK_PkSaFpzP1JqFhY3jVIKDOuDXygDe0qBaIBcmkwRNWTWkAUTZbe0BZT5bct-ypWZTtfWWLCMOJdicKIgzZMDM%3D)
---

Chuck Schumer and the Radical Democrats need to be held accountable for their reckless actions. From packing the court to stopping the wall, they are determined to undermine our security, stability, and prosperity. **They must be stopped.**

Senator Braun needs to know that you’re on his side. **[Will you commit to becoming a new donor today?](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=4bc952b9302e4043850a490fa3a9c004&_e=ovZvFW6RJ81bjPEoqcPOOJXnhF4LMZKzTetQ0eETjo14T7MVI0gcNwHfwl2QB1BFpvmP3kh7X7RD-fwpP6ojpm0ed07ev_OKo_z5ju19xRErkNFisIvTaB42lVSiv8pFnckcWsgnc1-WX6ugTz5eGo1g4Jr76wgPK45xZX2e-I6_eyutBrCknQWfI8WC4r92NQ3nWSPXr0-dCNNJd85GV7S5Yxo2u4DG1L0j4HpCtPXFvl7tq89POTWypA8xlAN-BwB5HOvSSeV2vfoDAbwG7Hke_qqLs5fwvaMuc9YWH6aykSX3NLDJ3GWR2hZlAe4kLCmcE6IjwaqYHJz1jQOPCpvmdFWVL8bdpTTEVv6Z-ZCKpNMYvdot3x3pPJyC8pkBePZnMq7bedF5HkCH4SwxW5crIcWZmTPHaxzTcHCprhky9-8NxjXN5rRGKNihoNs_TRPaHy50Ym44MzUD1I3dEuhHUVtY7_Be2PgT0rFjvKY%3D)** [**COUNT ME IN!**](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=4bc952b9302e4043850a490fa3a9c004&_e=ovZvFW6RJ81bjPEoqcPOOJXnhF4LMZKzTetQ0eETjo14T7MVI0gcNwHfwl2QB1BFpvmP3kh7X7RD-fwpP6ojpm0ed07ev_OKo_z5ju19xRErkNFisIvTaB42lVSiv8pFnckcWsgnc1-WX6ugTz5eGo1g4Jr76wgPK45xZX2e-I6_eyutBrCknQWfI8WC4r92NQ3nWSPXr0-dCNNJd85GV7S5Yxo2u4DG1L0j4HpCtPXFvl7tq89POTWypA8xlAN-EFZR335lplZHEEofJbeFwVqG4eKL34C65I_H194G30Bb8VeIkMJxrkdawvfmVCNnKUFAO_OSD7MDrCzGY9-Tfu2lUZyC457BgS-sG5mSy3d6uxXFWOnsIWIh2G8Oyx-P8Jvl4339HYDwwyywB6-oUitZZm-cPq6rGwkj_1HlDEr8gjySUE6AG7AHRgf4_sS8JbEkBoFnl2aI_ZvK_-FCWchV9iQXpAcJN5CDgkX8cWI%3D)

Braun Finance Team Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana

body:
Join Joe Kent and Conservative Ladies of Washington! | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
####
# **Join Joe Kent at "Send Me, Preserving Our Legacy", at City Farm Chehalis**
---
| [ ](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=484fe9a35b&e=00856e661d)
---
Please join me for dinner and felllowship, hosted by the Conservative Ladies of Washington on 26 June 2021!
|
The Conservative Ladies of Washington will be hosting a black-tie fundraiser for Joe on 26 June 2021. As part of his grassroots efforts, this fundraiser will continue the momentum forward for the campaign. Joe is honored to have the opportunity to spend an evening together speaking and answering questions over dinner! Help us sell out this event so we can help Joe finish this quarter strong! We would be honored if you would join us!

Sincerely,
Byron Sanford, Campaign Manager **_EVENT DETAILS_**

Date: June 26th, 2021

Time: 5-6pm VIP pre-reception (ticket required)
6-8pm Dinner and Main Event (ticket required)

Location: [City Farm Chehalis](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=f9f8f4e08c&e=00856e661d), 456 N. Market Blvd.
Chehalis, WA 98532 [Click here for map/directions](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=2ae18ab882&e=00856e661d)

**Purchase Tickets:** [Click here to view details/purchase](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=5961bdaa7c&e=00856e661d)

_**TICKET DETAILS**_

General Admission ($65.00 per ticket): ticket to main event 6-8pm, includes dinner

Host Committee ($250, two seats): priority seating near the stage. Ticket to VIP pre-reception 5pm-6pm with Joe Kent and dinner event 6pm-8pm.

Co-Chairman ($1,000, two seats): priority seating near the stage. Ticket to VIP pre-reception 5pm-6pm with Joe Kent and dinner event 6pm-8pm. Name listed on invite at each table. Swag bag.

Chairman ($2,900 two seats): priority seating near stage. Ticket to VIP pre-reception 5pm-6pm with Joe Kent and dinner event 6pm-8pm. Name listed at top of invite and at each table. Swag bag. Private briefing with the Candidate, General Consultant and Campaign Manager (scheduled separately).

Questions? Email info@joekentforcongress.com

body:
Join Joe Kent for a special event! | | | |
---
| | |

|
####
# **Join Joe Kent at "Make the Third Heard Again" event at Red Barn Studios**
---
| [ ](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=4488f89ec0&e=00856e661d)
---
Please join me for this dinner fundraiser on 27 June 2021! I hope to see you there!
|
Friendly reminder: Washingtonians for Change will be hosting a fundraiser for Joe on 27 June, 2021. As part of his grassroots efforts, this fundraiser will continue the momentum forward for the campaign. Joe is honored to have the opportunity to spend an afternoon together speaking and answering questions over dinner! Help us sell out this event so we can help Joe finish this quarter strong! We would be honored if you would join us! If you can't make this event, please check out our events page to learn about the black-tie event on 26 June 2021. We hope to see you!

Sincerely,
Byron Sanford, Campaign Manager **_EVENT DETAILS_**

Date: June 27th, 2021

Time: 1-2pm VIP pre-reception (ticket required)
2-4pm Dinner and Main Event (ticket required)

Location: [Red Barn Studios](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=2c08ba2b9f&e=00856e661d), Red Barn Studios
207 Goff Road, Chehalis, WA 98532 [Click here for map/directions](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=467b821ff7&e=00856e661d)

**Purchase Tickets:** [Click here to view/purchase tickets](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=1ef83a9d31&e=00856e661d)

_**TICKET DETAILS**_

General Admission ($65.00 per ticket): ticket to main event 2-4pm, includes dinner

Host Committee ($250, two seats): priority seating near the stage. Attend VIP pre-reception 1-2pm with Joe Kent and dinner event 2pm-4pm.

Co-Chairman ($1,000, two seats): priority seating near the stage. Ticket to VIP pre-reception 1-2pm with Joe Kent and dinner event 2pm-4pm. Name listed on invite at each table. Swag bag.

Chairman ($2,900 two seats): priority seating near stage. Ticket to VIP pre-reception 1-2pm with Joe Kent and dinner event 2pm-4pm. Name listed at top of invite and at each table. Swag bag. Private briefing with the Candidate, General Consultant and Campaign Manager (scheduled separately).

Questions? Email info@joekentforcongress.com

Election experts at Nate Silver’s _FiveThirtyEight_ told you this would be the most competitive election of 2021.

_The Washington Post_ said that Glenn Youngkin had “a surprisingly good chance” of winning.

_The Hill_ called this a “neck and neck” race.

**And now, a new poll shows this race within just TWO POINTS.**

name: Glenn Youngkin
subject: McAuliffe is attacking our police
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Youngkin for Governor, Inc
body:
Under 8 years of Terry McAuliffe’s agenda, we have witnessed a contemptible effort to demonize and defund our police officers and sheriffs.
| [ ](https://hk.t.hubspotemail.net/e2t/tc/MXhJ8lrT0v6N3YqZt3HjSqwW6D6W6y4sQgR_N1xVmYS3lGmwV1-WJV7CgNc5W4YQ43t7HnhGMW3075bw1HydLSW4QHFWf8hQHK7W5bGxSX1ldXKTVnmXnN5K_Z5PW8Zftrk93F0WDW7dCj1k5NkjlgV8By9W9brnxYW8BjMnp8211WzW60-lps69ptcqW42ZfZ-5x468MW9j57Sf8_Gj2rW3QD88b2KK31zW2zkD3v4s4xDXW32YFgL1F93cxV6xDsD3w9sRyW6JdcSd2VFGTHW4RLdD15b_lbyW52-sMD83Xjz9W5hB6kN9fS9VN3bhs1)
---
> Dear friends, The last few years have been challenging for our law enforcement. Under 8 years of Terry McAuliffe’s agenda, we have witnessed a contemptible effort to demonize and defund our police officers and sheriffs. These public servants risk their lives every day to protect and serve their communities, never wavering in the face of danger. Some have given their lives. Our Commonwealth is in urgent need of a governor that will fully fund and support our law enforcement. I assure you that when I am governor, Virginia’s law enforcement will know that we have their back because they have ours. We are eternally grateful to the brave men and women in blue. As governor, I will veto anti-police legislation and fight to get them the funding, training, and resources they need to do their jobs well and safely. I am opposed to Terry McAuliffe’s plan to end qualified immunity, which would allow police officers to be sued and personally bankrupted just for doing their job – it’s just another way of defunding the police. I will hold bad actors accountable, but I will never abandon these brave public servants. Working together, we will forge stronger bonds in our communities and find new ways to advance public safety. Law enforcement is one of the toughest jobs in America right now, and we must not take it for granted. Our law enforcement officers run towards danger when others run away. They serve with courage, dedication, and resolve. We owe them and their families our support.
---
---
\- Glenn Youngkin
---
Paid for by Youngkin for Governor, Inc. Not authorized by any other candidate.
---
Youngkin for Governor, PO Box 3950, Merrifield, VA 22116 [Unsubscribe](https://hs-9291217.s.hubspotemail.net/hs/manage-preferences/unsubscribe-all?d=VndxGB55H6bgVMdLpS3T0vFpW4ckpnd3P3Q7wW3ZsjYm3_fQ5sN76PHy1mWFd_W677P4g5ZnrNrV25BNP7Zzc8JN8CXQMSWHgPVN7XqHQWXk_7QVbw3sK4wlFFcW20RWX42qGmJ_w7qrNYK9WX2&v=3&utm_source=hs_email&utm_medium=email&utm_content=133683662&_hsenc=p2ANqtz-_0kng8JDPkeH-cr3yg8XwwpN0Z0m_CJljp3Ox8kgRpmREQgEdFv3rEkDLVkx5L5nCSiHx2c5LQQalpDr-lTPU6tTnOxA&_hsmi=133683662) [Manage preferences](https://hs-9291217.s.hubspotemail.net/hs/manage-preferences/unsubscribe?d=VndxGB55H6bgVMdLpS3T0vFpW4ckpnd3P3Q7wW3ZsjYm3_fQ5sN76PHy1mWFd_W677P4g5ZnrNrV25BNP7Zzc8JN8CXQMSWHgPVN7XqHQWXk_7QVbw3sK4wlFFcW20RWX42qGmJ_w7qrNYK9WX2&v=3&utm_source=hs_email&utm_medium=email&utm_content=133683662&_hsenc=p2ANqtz-_0kng8JDPkeH-cr3yg8XwwpN0Z0m_CJljp3Ox8kgRpmREQgEdFv3rEkDLVkx5L5nCSiHx2c5LQQalpDr-lTPU6tTnOxA&_hsmi=133683662)

name: Team Franchot
subject: Hot off the press
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Hi Peter --
We’re very excited to give you a major campaign update: we’ve just designed and printed our first batch of campaign flyers!
Take a look at these new designs, which are coming hot off the press and are being distributed to voters right at their doors.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campaignlit?refcode=Active&amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campaignlit?refcode=Active&amount=20.22] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campaignlit?refcode=Active&amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campaignlit?refcode=Active&amount=20.22]We’re looking forward to getting more flyers out to voters in the coming weeks and months! But in order to do that, we’re going to need your support. Will you chip in to help us print more copies of our new campaign literature? The more we can raise, the more copies we can print. The more copies we can print, the greater the number of voters we can reach with our message.
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campaignlit?refcode=Active&amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campaignlit?refcode=Active&amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campaignlit?refcode=Active&amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campaignlit?refcode=Active&amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campaignlit?refcode=Active]We rely on grassroots supporters like you to keep our campaign going, and anything you can give is greatly appreciated. To win this primary, we’re waging a battle in the air, on the ground, and through the fiber optic cables. By chipping in, you can help us stay ahead of the competition and continue to build our people-powered movement.
Peter Franchot is an unprecedented candidate for these unprecedented times, and as our next Governor, he’s going to make sure that no community is left behind in our economic recovery. Together, we’re going to deliver the big ideas and bold solutions that we need to respond to this historic moment. That includes creating 100,000 new jobs in industries of the future, building a statewide transit system that will bring communities together, making Maryland the first net zero state in the nation to save our environment, and so much more.
Click here to help us print more campaign literature. Anything you can give is greatly appreciated. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campaignlit?refcode=Active&amount=20.22]
Thank you,
Team Franchot
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campaignlit?refcode=Active&amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States

That includes creating 100,000 new jobs in industries of the future, building a statewide transit system that will bring communities together, making Maryland the first net zero state in the nation to save our environment, and so much more. Click here to help us print more campaign literature. Anything you can give is greatly appreciated. name: Adam Jones
subject: FWD: My meeting with President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
Hi Peter, I wanted to make sure you saw the below email from Kevin.

He recently had the opportunity to meet with President Trump, and the President reiterated his top priority in 2022 will be to flip the House red.
To do this, we need every commonsense conservative in the state to come together and chip in. **[Will you help today?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/cfd052b99ee81b59/9f82599b82f65d59c3d6b838967d376c/34143)** Please check out Kevin's email below and **[chip in what you can](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/cfd052b99ee81b59/958f2d1ed761f29dc3d6b838967d376c/34143)** ASAP. We must work together to take back the House next year! Thank you, Adam Jones Political Director, Hern for Congress | |
---
From: Kevin Hern <info@hernforcongress.com>
Date: Friday, June 11, 2021 at 2:08 PM
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Subject: My meeting with President Trump
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/cfd052b99ee81b59/4225e6e7a9f379bec3d6b838967d376c/34143)
Dear Peter,

Yesterday, I met with President Trump at the Trump National Golf Club in Bedminster, NJ, and he was in great spirits.

We talked a lot about the great work we’ve accomplished together for Oklahoma and the importance of conservative leadership at every level of government. He was impressed with my work on the Republican budget and wants to partner with conservative leaders to ensure a return to fiscal responsibility and America First policies.

President Trump’s top priority right now is taking back the majority in the House of Representatives next fall and he needs your help.
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/cfd052b99ee81b59/771385faeb41bf59c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
[**> >> Help Trump Take Back the House <<<**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/cfd052b99ee81b59/d2d0481f16b1f436c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
Biden and Pelosi are working to dismantle everything President Trump accomplished during the last four years. The only way we can stop them is to put Republicans back in charge of Congress.

Biden’s radical agenda is unpopular among every demographic, including some in his own party – but that’s not stopping Democrats from ramming their tax-and-spend policies through Congress at breakneck speed.

**If we don’t stop them, America as we know it will be gone.**

President Trump was very clear yesterday that he will do whatever it takes to win the House back. He’ll be campaigning around the country to put America First conservatives back in power. President Trump can’t wait to get back out on the campaign trail and see the American people face-to-face – maybe we’ll even get to see him in Oklahoma again!

I promised President Trump that I’d tell you about our important work to take back the House. **He wanted me to ask every red-blooded conservative back home to join him in this essential mission to restore the Republican majority and save his legacy. [Will you help us take back the House?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/cfd052b99ee81b59/d1bc01ffe78b759cc3d6b838967d376c/34143)**[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/cfd052b99ee81b59/d5eedb458bada652c3d6b838967d376c/34143)

Thank you for your continued friendship and support,

Kevin Hern
| [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/cfd052b99ee81b59/605b95a9605eb269c3d6b838967d376c/34143) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/cfd052b99ee81b59/9804b5908c01ff16c3d6b838967d376c/34143)

name: Hendrell Remus
subject: First time since becoming Chair
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, CAROL V
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Peter,
I’d like to be as transparent as possible here. Last month’s ‘end-of-month’ would have fallen on Memorial Day, which we felt would have been completely inappropriate to fundraise on. As a result we didn’t raise what we needed to for the month of May. That was the first month we didn’t reach our goal since I became Chair, and I’d like to fix that. Tomorrow at midnight is June’s mid-month deadline and I’m hoping to make up the difference.
If we can raise another $3,800 by midnight tomorrow, we will be back on track. I know that is more than we usually ask for during our mid-month series, but this time I feel I have to. Will you help us? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Thank you,
Hendrell Remus

Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Worth celebrating – but there's more work to be done
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=6xwRg0GyXuczMToW%2FGnlPCbzlhmtIwUI&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
In just a moment, I'm going to ask for your feedback on some of the most crucial issues facing our country - but before I do, I want to talk to you about how your input and activism is crucial to moving the needle on crucial issues.
Just the other week, I stood alongside my Senate colleagues, Vice President Harris, and President Biden as the COVID-19 Hate Crimes Act and the Jabara-Heyer NO HATE Act were signed into law. This is a critical action to combating hate in our country, and it's a big step in curbing bigoted, racist, xenophobic violence.
This is something I've been fighting for since 2017. Thousands of you fought alongside me - signing petitions, taking action, making your voice heard. We accomplished this major legislative feat together, thank you.
[](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-no-hate?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1034-su-nd)
While this is a milestone worth celebrating, we can't slow down for a minute. Even with this historic legislation, hate-based behavior remains a very real threat to many Americans' daily lives. Senate Democrats and the Biden administration continue to make other progress on building back better after the disastrous Trump administration, but there's much to be done: Gun safety reform, tackling climate change, ensuring nobody lacks affordable access to healthcare.
By speaking out about the issues that matter most, we've proven we can make change happen. **So today, I 'm asking you to take my newest priorities survey to let me know what's on your mind - and I'm looking for 500 more responses before my team's next strategy session. [Will you take just 60 seconds to submit your feedback now?](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-no-hate?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1034-su-nd)**

Grateful for all you do. We're making progress.
Dick

clean_body: Friend, In just a moment, I'm going to ask for your feedback on some of the most crucial issues facing our country - but before I do, I want to talk to you about how your input and activism is crucial to moving the needle on crucial issues. Just the other week, I stood alongside my Senate colleagues, Vice President Harris, and President Biden as the COVID-19 Hate Crimes Act and the Jabara-Heyer NO HATE Act were signed into law. This is a critical action to combating hate in our country, and it's a big step in curbing bigoted, racist, xenophobic violence. This is something I've been fighting for since 2017. Thousands of you fought alongside me - signing petitions, taking action, making your voice heard. We accomplished this major legislative feat together, thank you. While this is a milestone worth celebrating, we can't slow down for a minute. Even with this historic legislation, hate-based behavior remains a very real threat to many Americans' daily lives. Senate Democrats and the Biden administration continue to make other progress on building back better after the disastrous Trump administration, but there's much to be done: Gun safety reform, tackling climate change, ensuring nobody lacks affordable access to healthcare. By speaking out about the issues that matter most, we've proven we can make change happen. So today, I 'm asking you to take my newest priorities survey to let me know what's on your mind - and I'm looking for 500 more responses before my team's next strategy session. Grateful for all you do. We're making progress. Dick

name: Greater Georgia
subject: ICYMI: GREATER GEORGIA HD34 EFFORTS FEATURED IN AJC ARTICLE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, JUNE 14, 2021
ICYMI: GREATER GEORGIA HD34 EFFORTS FEATURED IN AJC ARTICLE
ATLANTA - In case you missed it, the Atlanta Journal-Constitution [featured](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bQ_vZ2aXC-LIwdgrKEQJ8oXza1oPM8xHQlaijgrCn00Oh0EBHDkwZaTz_fcHQCdUN2BRxWS0nuSovP3JyTU4a3XZkSqFXrUeIrE9hWruDikv_0jXtJEuxMMKL3se_hnEY9GVe46ttftzH6_HTaLTDItQpj8EviCHoshR6JO_HUmhw-uJ4u09GNNgGLqmadiVuCd2ps5ySIb838e6C4uh2Y3zZPdsV4zJK-5_xYLVni0FFNSLmVupBXarLMXlaNFN6jeOg7nmoVu_r2CRJYOFkKBeGmld-mcg&c=EeGq5_LoVa2EtTbeIrEsYn1WU6Ls5n5m0Au-LDE0Guol9sf14nZccg==&ch=GiGM5_pVEynmO7W2aANR7vkEbDUEdSNpKTUHKLo08Ff-8M33WbiZtA==) Greater Georgia in a story this morning about our efforts to mobilize conservative voters ahead of the upcoming special election for State House District 34 in Cobb County. The article highlights Greater Georgia's voter registration and mobilization [push](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bQ_vZ2aXC-LIwdgrKEQJ8oXza1oPM8xHQlaijgrCn00Oh0EBHDkwZYdyDgsAal_tdNzg4t1AYLmYK01e5QJ9XPxnN91vP8eELZ3ptfuInuvbLbU0ORDxuuKLfeq5z933bq9YXkEmy9GCAbkwJAQJe2PJt5RWixZVKkY600eJCq5N1-UyPAt6nOq9M6rPM_JAtmZ0oFvs-wjW8YTawnKq7-F3vNHhN5Rl9DNazuoW81fAKRmaR21yfj1G7fMXK95RiJ26LWzuTf9xAY6i_2_4NYK6p6NkbY7Sx6fNqtnqzBX-HNu5PiC5AA==&c=EeGq5_LoVa2EtTbeIrEsYn1WU6Ls5n5m0Au-LDE0Guol9sf14nZccg==&ch=GiGM5_pVEynmO7W2aANR7vkEbDUEdSNpKTUHKLo08Ff-8M33WbiZtA==), as well as our recent [billboard campaign](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bQ_vZ2aXC-LIwdgrKEQJ8oXza1oPM8xHQlaijgrCn00Oh0EBHDkwZeAAFW-8ImuVuaa5nPekAcNDcURnPjcdlPJlaU-SKtV9TvoPh0sdOmoHi3QjMZV49pl4F2zf3QMx5Rd8WqNRHBhW1OwvLfJt-Dz3dYgq1lFHyqwE-PHfKp8QpZOKz-XpXE6LL8RcbZr0PB_2woO1KpvGAl5aPLwSlsuT1xZFSmFvTCP4LSt48p--g5U4y096XQvaV-VP62gT8NkmMLtLX-c9McwxUY39D9E6LuoMIby8jC99dC2eEGX_bciMJfInb1418hRPqD0YDXzVXZQoic0=&c=EeGq5_LoVa2EtTbeIrEsYn1WU6Ls5n5m0Au-LDE0Guol9sf14nZccg==&ch=GiGM5_pVEynmO7W2aANR7vkEbDUEdSNpKTUHKLo08Ff-8M33WbiZtA==), Day of Action [deployment](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bQ_vZ2aXC-LIwdgrKEQJ8oXza1oPM8xHQlaijgrCn00Oh0EBHDkwZaTz_fcHQCdUhR7SM5C4wBWcaIFe4MIolxiAtbGzjvrnkpy_sFk1o_JdW-UrgPjg97oP8unExiymX0ejldQJWz1T5irxdqI_ynVCGuUBhoSDbH5CESZbNEAY3Al-IDPrfLM7ng8JXS5nLB2cYrEElls=&c=EeGq5_LoVa2EtTbeIrEsYn1WU6Ls5n5m0Au-LDE0Guol9sf14nZccg==&ch=GiGM5_pVEynmO7W2aANR7vkEbDUEdSNpKTUHKLo08Ff-8M33WbiZtA==), and grassroots voter-contact [efforts](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bQ_vZ2aXC-LIwdgrKEQJ8oXza1oPM8xHQlaijgrCn00Oh0EBHDkwZT8ALdFhLx7lOpRXoxQ2ridLsC55nroeqIVwthtuc4i6_de4TpQ0KRsyJWB2_2SMqJFvqrPPTxHX58FfHaHlzQ8ZDa-MUh5C74JVMOrMJfDiw6vSLWQJwvWzos9ai-7Eu6E9p_cAVim9qxUCENAfLVY1KpmHiaoE6Inhz7YWe8XzysaY3XWREWWzJ5l9Blcsd0CKQ69vQxz6b5DQIVm7cwpxkNjn424W9UMj7bqARSZq&c=EeGq5_LoVa2EtTbeIrEsYn1WU6Ls5n5m0Au-LDE0Guol9sf14nZccg==&ch=GiGM5_pVEynmO7W2aANR7vkEbDUEdSNpKTUHKLo08Ff-8M33WbiZtA==). From the AJC:
Voting groups founded by Democrat Stacey Abrams and Republican Kelly Loeffler are going head-to-head as each pours money and resources into the race to mobilize supporters ...
For the first time in a Georgia election, Fair Fight will go toe-to-toe with the Greater Georgia group that Loeffler founded to register GOP voters and motivate them to cast their ballots.
The organization has launched a digital ad campaign to boost voter turnout that highlights Major League Baseball's decision to yank its All-Star game from Atlanta in protest of the new election law. And it's beefed up its door-knocking, text-messaging and phone-banking efforts, including an early June "day of action" that reached hundreds of residents.
"One of the biggest motivating factors there is making sure that there's election integrity," said Loeffler, who lost her seat in the U.S. Senate in January. "Early voting is going on right now, so we have poll watchers and canvassers working to make sure that their vote counts. And that work has to go on continuously."
Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bQ_vZ2aXC-LIwdgrKEQJ8oXza1oPM8xHQlaijgrCn00Oh0EBHDkwZaTz_fcHQCdUN2BRxWS0nuSovP3JyTU4a3XZkSqFXrUeIrE9hWruDikv_0jXtJEuxMMKL3se_hnEY9GVe46ttftzH6_HTaLTDItQpj8EviCHoshR6JO_HUmhw-uJ4u09GNNgGLqmadiVuCd2ps5ySIb838e6C4uh2Y3zZPdsV4zJK-5_xYLVni0FFNSLmVupBXarLMXlaNFN6jeOg7nmoVu_r2CRJYOFkKBeGmld-mcg&c=EeGq5_LoVa2EtTbeIrEsYn1WU6Ls5n5m0Au-LDE0Guol9sf14nZccg==&ch=GiGM5_pVEynmO7W2aANR7vkEbDUEdSNpKTUHKLo08Ff-8M33WbiZtA==) to read the full article.

clean_body: | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, JUNE 14, 2021 ICYMI: GREATER GEORGIA HD34 EFFORTS FEATURED IN AJC ARTICLE ATLANTA - In case you missed it, the Atlanta Journal-Constitution == Greater Georgia in a story this morning about our efforts to mobilize conservative voters ahead of the upcoming special election for State House District 34 in Cobb County. The article highlights Greater Georgia's voter registration and mobilization ==, as well as our recent ==, Day of Action ==, and grassroots voter-contact ==. From the AJC: Voting groups founded by Democrat Stacey Abrams and Republican Kelly Loeffler are going head-to-head as each pours money and resources into the race to mobilize supporters ... For the first time in a Georgia election, Fair Fight will go toe-to-toe with the Greater Georgia group that Loeffler founded to register GOP voters and motivate them to cast their ballots. The organization has launched a digital ad campaign to boost voter turnout that highlights Major League Baseball's decision to yank its All-Star game from Atlanta in protest of the new election law. And it's beefed up its door-knocking, text-messaging and phone-banking efforts, including an early June "day of action" that reached hundreds of residents. "One of the biggest motivating factors there is making sure that there's election integrity," said Loeffler, who lost her seat in the U.S. Senate in January. "Early voting is going on right now, so we have poll watchers and canvassers working to make sure that their vote counts. And that work has to go on continuously." name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Justice for Abuela!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
AOC is full of it |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=344b1cd69d&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

I think we have all had it with AOC. She's a first class fraud.

Last week, she levelled some serious accusations at President Trump (who hasn't been in office for over 5 months), that he slowed down relief aid to Puerto Rico.

It's the same false accusation that my opponent, Democrat Darren Soto, has levelled many times against President Trump. It was untrue coming from him, and it's equally untrue coming from AOC!

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=bbcf26a0b2&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, a Pelosi stooge. I nearly beat him last year, and I intend to finish the job this time!**

So, AOC made her accusation by posting photos of her Abuela's home, still unrepaired.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=83749bab97&e=afa21b7626)
---
| __**The only problem? Trump hasn't been President for 5 months! She doesn't lay a bit of blame at Biden's feet, does she?**__

**The other problem, of course, is that instead of waiting for government to help, she herself could have helped her Abuela with her $200k/year salary as a Congresswoman. After all, AOC has a posh loft in DC, another in her district, and drives a Tesla.**

A conservative blogger actually raised over $100,000 for AOC's Abuela, to repair her home. AOC refused it.

Her attempt to use her Abuela to try to dunk on President Trump was a lie, and despicable.

Now, why does this matter? Because my district has a large Puerto Rican community. The Dems, including my opponent, desperately want to blame President Trump for a lack of aid- but in reality, the island's corrupt government couldn't get its own act together!

_The U.K. Daily mail visited “abuela” Clotilde Rivera‘s home this week and was able to speak with a woman at the residence who claimed to be the New York Democrat’s aunt.

Assertions that Mr. Trump’s administration denied Hurricane Maria relief — and is therefore responsible for an unrepaired home — were challenged by the Puerto Rican relative.

“I am her aunt,” she told the website, while declining to share her full name. “We don’t speak for the community. ... _It’s a problem here in Puerto Rico with the administration_ and the distribution of help. It is not a problem with Washington. _We had the assistance and it didn’t get to the people_.”_

_Help me get to Congress, and I'll demand accountability from PR's corrupt liberal government. And we will get aid to the people who need it- and prove AOC wrong, once again!_

I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and nearly beating the incumbent Darren Soto. _I gave him a scare that almost beat him! I am back to finish the job this cycle, starting earlier and I need your help!_

We need congressmen who will FIGHT AOC, not JOIN her. [Can you help me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=6edc0b2b18&e=afa21b7626)

The Dems must go! [Help me demand accountability and protect our freedoms!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=4a281a0b8b&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=078257037c&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=ac458f9d17&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=40d6c33b93&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
_William Olson is a retired member of the US Army Active Guard Reserve. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense._
---
| |
---

**Our mailing address is:**
William Olson for Congress242 Kendal WayDavenport, FL 33837-4542
[Add us to your address book](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=cfef60ff2b) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=cfef60ff2b).
---

name: Giffords.org
subject: Quick Ask
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends - this has not been a week of good news for us. Let us break things down and then make a quick ask.
**FIRST:** Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans are fighting to block our attempts at passing universal background checks.
**THEN:** An extremist federal judge in California overturned the state’s 32-year long assault weapons ban.
**SO NOW:** We really can’t afford to fall short of our goals. It is critical that our fundraising stays on track because if it doesn’t, our ability to fight for change will be weakened.
[**So here’s the plan: Can you send a $3 donation today to help us urge the Senate to pass universal background checks? Your support, along with others, will help us pass this bill and save lives.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jun21?refcode=em210614-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=224_3935704_tKidPE&akid=224%2E3935704%2EtKidPE)

name: Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez
subject: 6,588 votes short of victory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez

Last year I nearly made history as the first Latina Republican
elected to Congress from South Texas...

Peter,

Not too long ago, Latinos were expected and
assumed to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in
political demography. In fact, until recently, Latinos were about
as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.

I'm helping to change that narrative. I'm
not a "coconut" - - brown on the outside, white on the inside -
as some have called me. And I'm certainly not a "self-hating
Latino," as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La
Cruz-Hernandez, a proud Latina Republican, and I'm running for
Congress in Texas' 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED
which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY.

Last year, I ran for the same seat in
Congress I'm running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and
fell short by
just 6,588 votes.
I didn't get to the top of the hill in
2020, but I'm a fighter - I never give up. So, I'm running again,
and it would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in
$6 to help elect a Latina Republican from TEXAS!

Help Send a Latina Republican to Congress

Chip in Today! ⇒

I've been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep.
Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others.

As you may have heard, Republicans only
need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly,
without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up
short and Democrats will retain their majority.

In 2020, Republicans had the "Year of the
Republican Woman" when the number of Republican women in the
House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need
more! We need more brown Republican women of color.

Will you help me prove a point to the
Democrats that they don't have a monopoly on women, people of
color, or Latinos?

Help Send a Latina Republican to Congress

Chip in Today! ⇒

Culturally, Latinos are conservative: most
of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me
and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC
is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes
in Latino communities here in South Texas, "being Democrat, it's
just what you do."

But Democrats have veered so far to the
left, the Party of my parents' generation is just unrecognizable.

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed
24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four
years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can't do
it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that's why I'm asking for you
to invest in my campaign today.

If you're a Latino Republican, please help
me be a voice for you in Washington. If you're not Latino, invest
in me so I can prove to socialist Democrats that they can't
expect to act like imbeciles and get the votes of women and
minorities just because they have in the past.

Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about
South Texas, "If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid
right now."

Help me prove him right.

Thank you for your time.

Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez

Republican for Congress

Help Send a Latina Republican to Congress

Chip In Today! ⇒

Paid for by Monica for Congress

body:

Sen. Marco Rubio has let our country down for the last time.

That’s why we’re sending him this **SCATHING REBUKE** and backing his amazing Senate challenger, Democrat Val Demings. Please sign on so we can show Rubio that we’re fed up with his failed leadership.

name: Team Crist
subject: Crist’s Statewide Voting Rights Tour Showcases “Empathy” and “Commitment to Floridians Across the State”
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
What a week.
|
---

| | Hey Friend,

As one of our active supporters on this email list, we want to make sure you had access to some of our campaign's big moments and activity throughout the entire state of Florida. _Below you will find highlights from Charlie 's Right to Vote tour! Thank you._ **Crist 's Statewide Voting Rights Tour Showcases "Empathy" and "Commitment to Floridians Across the State"**

_In Second Tour of Campaign, Crist Campaigned in Tampa, Orlando, Gainesville, Tallahassee, Palm Beach, Broward, and Miami Tour Follows Crist 's Record-Setting Fundraising and Early Endorsements by Local Florida Leaders_ ST. PETERSBURG -- Charlie Crist, candidate for Governor of Florida, has wrapped up a week long "Voting Rights Tour" of the state where he hosted roundtable discussions with local leaders, activists, and community organizers in Tampa, Orlando, Gainesville, Tallahassee, Broward, Palm Beach and Miami to hear firsthand how Governor DeSantis's new voting law is hurting everyday Floridians.

During the tour, Charlie was **[endorsed by seven respected state legislators from across Florida,](https://act.myngp.com/el/KVWCt-jtspdkAvgcyVc3VA==/p7o--juRuVGXO-49LDJC1g==)** who cited his commitment to Florida's diverse communities and promise to build a Florida that works for all Floridians.

Here are some highlights: **Day 1: Tampa and Orlando** Charlie kicked off the "Voting Rights Tour" with a roundtable discussion in Tampa at St. Paul Lutheran Church where he was joined by Congresswoman Kathy Castor, Commissioner Ken Welch, and disabilities advocate Laura-Lee Minutello. _**" What we're seeing out of Tallahassee is horrific, frankly," Crist said. "This is putting up road blocks to democracy -- it is anti-democracy, what they're doing; it is anti-senior, what they are doing; anti-disabled, what they are doing. It is just fundamentally wrong..."**_

But, at Tuesday's roundtable, disability rights advocate Laura-Lee Minutello emphasized the impact these new standards may have on the disabled community, especially by limiting the number of ballots an individual can drop off at a box and restricting it to a number of family members.

_**" It's not like you can just say 'I have time at this point and I can go drop off the ballot,'" she said. "Not everyone has a caregiver that's able to do that for them."

[- Florida Politics](https://act.myngp.com/el/KVWCt-jtspdkAvgcyVc3VA==/njtyeEPZ2pF0f3PNoofcAg==)**_ _****_ Later in the afternoon, Charlie met members of the Black and Puerto Rican community at the Alianza for Progress offices in Orlando, where the discussion centered around the disenfranchisement Floridians of color are facing as a result of SB 90. _**" If you can't cast your ballot, or others make it more difficult for you to be able to do," Crist said, "they're basically impeding your freedom and your voice."

[- Politico](https://act.myngp.com/el/KVWCt-jtspdkAvgcyVc3VA==/9NJJ3H6rhvmI5KB-oOn-Ew==)**_ _****_

Video of the entire conversation can be found [here.](https://act.myngp.com/el/KVWCt-jtspdkAvgcyVc3VA==/tw5skwEHzok4pinIbR07KA==?__so__=channel_tab&__rv__=all_videos_card) **Day 2: Gainesville and Tallahassee** Charlie's first stop on day two was in Gainesville, where he met with Democratic University of Florida student leaders and outlined a plan to support young voters and encourage participation in elections. _**" The notion that this [SB 90] is supposed to somehow increase security of voting, we already have it, we already have it," said Crist. "What this is intended to do is to suppress voting, that's why the governor wouldn't invite the press when he signed the bill, except for who? Fox news and only fox news."

[- ABC TV 20 Gainesville](https://act.myngp.com/el/KVWCt-jtspdkAvgcyVc3VA==/RtYPyLS9w8HgzTUTKVg3bg==)**_ _****_ Tallahassee was Charlie's second stop of the day, marking his first visit to the city since announcing his campaign. Inside a packed NAACP office, Charlie hosted a candid conversation highlighting how the attack on voting rights is an attack on communities across the board, especially communities of color. _**" You don't have to judge me by the words I put out during a campaign but by my deeds," Crist said, adding that as governor he restored voting rights to more than 150,000 former felons.

[- Tallahassee Democrat](https://act.myngp.com/el/KVWCt-jtspdkAvgcyVc3VA==/c-fjEFPO6wwtUTW_4grOXA==)**_ _****_ **Day 3: Broward and West Palm Beach** Following his stop in Tallahassee, Charlie spent Thursday morning in Broward County starting off with a roundtable discussion with local faith and community leaders. _**" I am supporting Charlie Crist because he's fair, imminently honest. He cares about the people of Florida more than anybody I have ever met. I think he'll do great things for Florida," said Koch, chairwoman of the Palm Beach County Democratic Party's Legislative Committee... "With all of us behind [Crist], we could very well win this."

[- Sun Sentinel](https://act.myngp.com/el/KVWCt-jtspdkAvgcyVc3VA==/E2Aa00vDp11Gulm24CWXzA==)**_ _****_ West Palm Beach was Charlie's next stop, where Crist called for a moment of silence following news of a deadly shooting inside a local Publix that has left three dead. _**" Heartbreaking and unacceptable violence, again, in our Florida. I'm praying for the families affected - but we have to match our prayers with action. There is a crisis of gun violence in our communities. It has to stop," said Charlie.**_ The afternoon in West Palm continued with conversation centering around the need to band together to turn our state around and make sure all Floridians have a voice at the ballot box. _**" The congressman voiced his commitment to reaching out to Floridians across the state during his run for governor. From former felons to folks in the conservative Panhandle, Crist said he wants to look people in the eyes and discuss with them the things that matter most to their communities."

[- The Palm Beach Post](https://act.myngp.com/el/KVWCt-jtspdkAvgcyVc3VA==/ALVfXfUKkWYGs2P5ZoGs2w==)**_ _****_ **Day 4: Miami** The final stop on Charlie's statewide tour was Miami, where Miami Beach Mayor Dan Gelber and Miami Shores Mayor Crystal Wagar joined Charlie on a small business visit to shine a light on the lack of leadership displayed by Governor DeSantis during the pandemic. The mayors shared the burden they faced trying to protect their communities against the spread of COVID despite receiving no support from Tallahassee. **[Read more here.](https://act.myngp.com/el/KVWCt-jtspdkAvgcyVc3VA==/luWzWqoizTBVv_AtO5lneg== )** _**" Mayors across Florida were forced to do the hard work of taking care of the health of their communities while Governor DeSantis rallied against mask wearing and common sense practices that would have saved Floridian lives. Over 36,000 of our fellow neighbors are dead, who knows how many would still be with us today had the Governor listened to doctors and medical professionals. I want to be a Governor that listens to science AND supports our small businesses. It really is that simple," said Charlie.**_

| [DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/KVWCt-jtspdkAvgcyVc3VA==/6WwxnLr4ByfciAoRwswxxA==?refcode=614press&amount=25)
---

---

| Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
---

Charlie Crist for Governor
P.O. Box 1547
St. Petersburg FL 33731 United States

[unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/KVWCt-jtspdkAvgcyVc3VA==/iWd5UgJWpxnnQI-6OXcrpA==)

name: Culp for Congress
subject: The Border Crisis is No Surprise, but How it's affecting Washington State Might Be.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BhddPk&mc=Jo&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=Ewq2CA2&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-5.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/23e19950-2ca5-47c1-b43e-60873187b53d.png]

What a surprise! The Biden administration policies have created a border crisis. But, what might surprise you is how the border issues are bringing drug cartels to the PNW!

Officials from The Department of Homeland Security have warned of a cartel called the Jalisco New Generation Cartel and they are moving into Washington State and increasing cartel activity in central, and southeast Washington. Even Director Wray of the FBI said in a hearing on June 11th that there was "no question" cartel activity was spilling across Biden's open U.S.-Mexico border. What do you think Kamala Harris (Biden's border czar) said when reporters asked when she would visit the border to address these issues? She laughed then said, “And I haven’t been to Europe. I don't understand the point that you're making." Yeah, that was her response to the disaster the Biden Administration has created. Let's focus on one aspect of this crisis, the flood of drugs pouring into the PNW.

Fentanyl Drug Seizures on the border (fentanyl is one of the top drugs involved in overdoses in Washington State) have skyrocketed in the 2021 Fiscal year!

In May 2021, U.S. Customs and Border Protection seized 951 pounds of Fentanyl. That is an increase of 396 percent from May, 2020! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=S0rnFA&mc=Jo&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EzYhMSv&]Which means
there is no way of knowing how much Fentanyl isn't being caught and is being successfully smuggled into America, into your communities, into your neighborhoods, and possibly into your family.
So I ask you, is there any doubt why we're seeing an increase of drug issues in Washington state?

[https://m.gr-cdn-5.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/fb446ae3-5170-4019-9510-6cc9bce5e053.jpg]

The solution is simple, follow President Trump's border policies.

Trump's border methods worked and protected Americans, protected you, from drug smuggling, human trafficking, and other illegal activities. But the Biden administration isn't interested in "America First" policies or protecting the American people. Neither are the weak RINO's like Dan Newhouse who side with the radical left, not only because he voted to Impeach President Trump and voted with the radical left for the January 6th Commission, but because Newhouse is constantly compromising with the left. He even proudly talks about how he reaches across the aisle. When has the radical left ever compromised? I can't recall a time.

RINO's like Newhouse act like a drowning man, constantly reaching out to the Democrats like they're a life preserver. It's time we get on the offensive, and when I'm elected as your Congressman, that's exactly what I will do.

There is a way to stop the left's radical agenda!

But as you know, I can't do it without every country loving American! I need you to step up and help me raise the money that we need to take on the problems caused by Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and the weak-kneed Republicans like Dan Newhouse. With the wave of patriots looking to serve in our United States House in 2022, backed by you, the American people, we will work to dismantle the unconstitutional laws put forward by the leftists in congress.

I'm honored and looking forward to serving "we the people" and taking our America First values to Capital Hill.

Loren

**[Give the article a read here,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30792691/290635904/-788572399?refcode=em210614-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzhkMTA1ZS0zZmNkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_ncb9NvG0oQrVn_wqal3ioYVHHI71Fx3_whKkelTT3Y=&emci=78289541-3fcd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=878d105e-3fcd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=24719896)** and then, if you’re able, make a contribution to Mondaire’s re-election campaign so he can stay in Congress fighting for voting rights for all Americans.

Reforms like automatic voter registration, public financing for campaigns, and ending voter roll purges are key tenets of the _For the People Act_ that will go a long way in protecting our democracy.
But Republicans in Congress are filibustering to prevent its passage — and GOP-majority legislators across the country have been making it more difficult to vote for years by purging voter rolls, instituting arbitrary voter ID laws, and even making it illegal to bring food and water to people waiting in line to vote.
We’re proud of Mondaire for supporting the For the People Act and speaking out against voter suppression.
**[Read his article in the New York Daily News,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30792695/290635909/-788572399?refcode=em210614-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzhkMTA1ZS0zZmNkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_ncb9NvG0oQrVn_wqal3ioYVHHI71Fx3_whKkelTT3Y=&emci=78289541-3fcd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=878d105e-3fcd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=24719896)** and then, if you’re able, make a contribution to his re-election campaign today.
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30792696/290635910/-254107743?refcode2=878d105e-3fcd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210614-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzhkMTA1ZS0zZmNkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_ncb9NvG0oQrVn_wqal3ioYVHHI71Fx3_whKkelTT3Y=)**

body:
| do you know a future field director?
---
[ ](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiY3JocWZxajlsMXYxNnc1MW10OHoiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vbWVGV0hXYmFlVS9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNjE0MjFfRFNJX0dlbmVyaWNcdTAwMjZfX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kifQ)
Peter – If November 2020 showed us _anything,_ it’s how important it is to have diverse, dynamic field programs. That’s why we’re recruiting and investing in the _next_ generation of Field Directors! **The Democratic Strategy Institute’s (DSI) Field Director Training Cohort** is an intensive, 8-week program designed to train future Field Directors and help them make the jump into campaign leadership. Cohort members will:
* Gain access to top campaign field experts
* Learn how to create data-driven field strategies
* Practice using cutting-edge organizing tactics
* Gain equity-informed management practices

[**And the best part? The program is**** _100% FREE_****to anyone accepted. Applications are open NOW so don’t wait to toss your hat in the ring OR encourage a friend to apply!**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiY3JocWZxajlsMXYxNnc1MW10OHoiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vem52REdpUUFjVy9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNjE0MjFfRFNJX0dlbmVyaWNcdTAwMjZfX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kifQ) | [APPLY TODAY →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiY3JocWZxajlsMXYxNnc1MW10OHoiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vR29pRW5uZ2N2NC9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNjE0MjFfRFNJX0dlbmVyaWNcdTAwMjZfX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kifQ)
---
The right candidate for this program is someone who:
* Has two or more cycles of field organizing experience
* Loves uniting a community around a candidate or issue
* Is ready to take their career to the next level

_We strongly encourage leaders who are women, people of color, and transgender and non-binary to apply._
[**If this sounds like you, click here to start your application right now!**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiY3JocWZxajlsMXYxNnc1MW10OHoiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vRlhST1B0MnM0YS9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNjE0MjFfRFNJX0dlbmVyaWNcdTAwMjZfX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kifQ)
[APPLY TODAY →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiY3JocWZxajlsMXYxNnc1MW10OHoiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vcGRoUktSTjVnWi9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNjE0MjFfRFNJX0dlbmVyaWNcdTAwMjZfX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kifQ)
---
And if it doesn’t, then _please_ help us make this inaugural class a huge success, just like you’ve done with Staff Academy (now over 300 graduates strong)!
[**Forward this email to three talented leaders who are ready to drive Democratic campaigns as successful Field Directors.**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiY3JocWZxajlsMXYxNnc1MW10OHoiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vcGFxQzltSldNci9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNjE0MjFfRFNJX0dlbmVyaWNcdTAwMjZfX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kifQ)
[GO NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiY3JocWZxajlsMXYxNnc1MW10OHoiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vM3FxWDdpVWRDRi9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNjE0MjFfRFNJX0dlbmVyaWNcdTAwMjZfX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kifQ)

That’s why we’re recruiting and investing in the next generation of Field Directors! The Democratic Strategy Institute’s (DSI) Field Director Training Cohort is an intensive, 8-week program designed to train future Field Directors and help them make the jump into campaign leadership. Cohort members will: Gain access to top campaign field experts Learn how to create data-driven field strategies Practice using cutting-edge organizing tactics Gain equity-informed management practices | The right candidate for this program is someone who: Has two or more cycles of field organizing experience Loves uniting a community around a candidate or issue Is ready to take their career to the next level We strongly encourage leaders who are women, people of color, and transgender and non-binary to apply. And if it doesn’t, then please help us make this inaugural class a huge success, just like you’ve done with Staff Academy (now over 300 graduates strong)! name: Mark Kelly
subject: friend, coming up short is not an option.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
You’ve been hearing a lot from my team recently about the importance of our 72-hour fundraising deadline that ends tomorrow at midnight. I wanted to make sure you had a chance to hear from me too because this goal is really important. Can I have a minute to explain?
Our June FEC fundraising deadline is coming up at the end of this month, and we need to make sure we hit our milestones like this 10,000 contribution goal so we can stay on track for success at the end of the month.
Coming up short is not an option, because The Hill just named us one of the Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022. So we’re working around the clock to lay the groundwork for another successful campaign.
My finance team tells me we still have some work to do to hit our 10,000 contribution goal before tomorrow. This is really important, so I’m coming directly to you:
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign? Every donation we receive before tomorrow at midnight will be put right to work in our efforts to hold this seat.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210614-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=789_6688874_cl2b4y&akid=789%2E6688874%2Ecl2b4y)
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210614-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=789_6688874_cl2b4y&akid=789%2E6688874%2Ecl2b4y)**
These deadlines are a good opportunity for us to show our opponents that nothing can stop us as we prepare to hold this seat in 2022.
So any amount you’re able to give before midnight will be a huge help to this people-powered campaign.
Thank you for all you do,
Mark Kelly
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210614-1-subs&t=3&refcode2=789_6688874_cl2b4y&akid=789%2E6688874%2Ecl2b4y)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=789%2E6688874%2Ecl2b4y).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: John Fetterman
subject: Respectfully asking:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I'm gonna share a personal story about pride, love, and why I will never stop fighting for our LGBTQIA+ community.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210614-1746-header&t=1&akid=1746%2E434096%2E0J-msu)
[**_Peter, I'm emailing you today to respectfully ask if you'll chip in your very first donation to our grassroots campaign._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20030?refcode=em20210614-1746&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1746%2E434096%2E0J-msu) Before I do that, I’m gonna share a personal story about pride, love, and why I will *never* stop fighting for our LGBTQIA+ community in PA and across the country. It's kind of long, but it's important:__
Bill Gray and John Kandray didn't have a typical wedding ceremony.__
For one thing, it was held in my unfinished loft, with only a matter of hours to prepare. Things were a bit hectic. But the air was electric, because it would be the first same-sex marriage ever performed in Allegheny County.__
**This was 2013, and under the Defense of Marriage Act, same-sex marriage was banned in Pennsylvania.**__
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20030?refcode=em20210614-1746&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=1746%2E434096%2E0J-msu)
_Two couples deeply in love: Bill Gray and John Kandray, joined by John and Gisele_
I thought it was a disgrace that Pennsylvania had made discrimination a part of our state law — that's why I proudly joined the "Mayors for the Freedom to Marry" (the first mayor in Pennsylvania to do so) and announced that I would do what no other elected official in the state would: _Defy the state law and officiate same-sex weddings._
Bill and John were the first couple who called me, not long after they had driven hundreds of miles across Pennsylvania to obtain a license in Montgomery County. The county's register of wills had begun issuing marriage licenses to same-sex couples, and they knew this was their chance to obtain one in their home state.
**They had shared a life together for 11 years, with a house and two dogs. The fact that a couple as kind and nice as them could not marry each other showed that there was something fundamentally wrong with the system.**
Bill and John didn't want to wait until the weekend. I couldn't blame them. They had been waiting for this moment for over a decade. So we held the ceremony on a Monday night right after work.
I put on my finest cargo shorts and black Dickies work shirt, picked up a rainbow cake from Costco, and we had ourselves a wedding surrounded by their family and friends. 🌈💛
For anyone who was there that night or saw the wedding on the news, it was impossible not to see the joy on Bill and John's faces and deny that their love was just as pure, just as valid as anyone else's.**I ended up officiating over two dozen more same-sex weddings before the ban was finally overturned, but none were as memorable as that first one.**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20030?refcode=em20210614-1746&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=1746%2E434096%2E0J-msu)
_On MSNBC in 2013_
Now that marriage equality is the law of the land, it's easy to forget that only a few years ago, Pennsylvania was just one of 35 states that still banned same-sex marriage. We were under legal threat from Republican Governor Tom Corbett's office, and a lot of people said what I was doing was disgusting and wrong.
But I never asked for a legal opinion. I never was concerned what performing these ceremonies would cost me personally. I was always going to choose to do the right thing, regardless of the consequences — and I was quite frankly disappointed in other elected officials who didn't step up and do the same.
**Of course, the fight for equality didn't end that night in my living room.** Bill and John's marriage still wasn't recognized by the state or federal government. But weddings like theirs helped to turn the tide for marriage equality — until finally, in May of 2014, a judge ruled that gay couples would no longer be relegated to second-class citizenship in the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania.
And then in 2015, the Supreme Court ruled that the U.S. Constitution requires states to license and recognize same-sex marriages.
We've made some incredible progress, but there are still steps we need to take to ensure LGBTQIA+ Americans are treated as equal citizens. It's ludicrous that in 2021, someone can in many instances still be fired from their job, refused care at a hospital, or denied housing because of their sexual orientation or gender identity. How can we let students go to school everyday in an environment where they're afraid to be verbally or physically bullied?
We are better than this, which is why we need to keep moving forward. The Senate MUST pass the Equality Act. We're closer than we've ever been — and as a U.S. Senator, I want to make sure we get there. **Expanding rights and protections for LGBTQIA+ Americans is a no-brainer, because just like in 2013, I'm always going to do the right thing regardless of the political consequences.**
[**_Peter, if that's the kind of leadership you'd like to see representing working families in the U.S. Senate, then I have to ask you: Will you make your very first donation to our campaign today?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20030?refcode=em20210614-1746&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=1746%2E434096%2E0J-msu)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20030?refcode=em20210614-1746&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=1746%2E434096%2E0J-msu)**
Yours,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210614-1746-footer&t=25&refcode2=1746_434096_0J-msu&akid=1746%2E434096%2E0J-msu)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: Action Alert (LeftAction)
subject: Sign the Petition: Demand that Trump & Barr be held accountable for spying
body:
Add your name to demand Attorney General Merrick Garland hold Trump and Barr accountable for spying on House Democrats and journalists!
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
# [SIGN THE PETITION: DEMAND TRUMP & BARR BE HELD ACCOUNTABLE FOR SPYING ON JOURNALISTS AND HOUSE DEMOCRATS](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0356ba38-1b11-4508-9c54-140f63bc8209/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta89bbc51-81aa-4727-8f05-a5aebd94e51a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Hi Friend, A day after news broke that disgraced ex-President Trump and his cronies in the Justice Department had been spying on at least two House Democrats, the Department of Justice Inspector General announced an investigation into the egregious abuse of power. It's a good start but not nearly enough. Too often, criminal officials are given a pass even after their crimes are known. That cannot happen here. [**Add your name to demand Attorney General Merrick Garland hold Trump and Barr accountable for spying on House Democrats and journalists!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1e1d3ea1-eba2-443f-9496-b949d8fd0a7b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6b7cfcf3-463a-4f23-ade3-2c94e68695e2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | DON'T LET THEM GET AWAY WITH THIS. DEMAND THEY BE HELD ACCOUNTABLE.
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://default.salsalabs.org/T627167d9-2c83-4b61-8463-103a0a1306ea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
## Other Hot Actions Right Now
---
| |
---
|

[Use this form](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1a5a46d9-3508-4676-91b6-d2d11d994c09/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) to demand that the wealthy pay their fair share.
---
|
---
|
### Laugh at Trump's Blog Fail
The guy who managed to go bankrupt selling steak, vodka, and gambling has now [failed spectacularly at blogging](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf797f53d-510d-4dab-b381-522806342c82/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9).

clean_body: Time is running out to accept this offer, Peter. | Authorized by Republican Headquarters Congratulations, Peter! As one of the TOP REPUBLICANS in Englewood, FL, you’ve been selected for an exclusive invitation to our 2021 Majority Makers program! Chairman Michael Whatley asked us to reach out to you directly with this Special Offer, Peter. He also asked us to update him before midnight tonight to confirm whether you’ve accepted his invitation. So please, don’t delay. We’d hate to have to tell him you said “no.” | | Congrats again! **The Biden Harris Border Crisis is getting worse!**

**As I said when I launched my campaign last week: NO BORDER, NO SECURITY; NO SECURITY, NO COUNTRY. It’s just that simple!** Securing our border is a federal responsibility, yet President Biden is derelict in his duty and refuses to respond to the crisis.

name: Caitlyn for California
subject: I Love California
body:
| | Friend, I love California. Just like so many others, I came to this state to chase a dream, and I achieved mine. Now, I want to make it easier for everyone to achieve their own California dream. **We must put California and the citizens of this state first again. ** Gavin Newsom has **NOT** put this state first. He has put special interests and his own political ambitions ahead of us. **He 's made California sick. **If we don't address this problem now, **our California Dream won 't survive. ** _It 's time to FIGHT to restore this dream and the state that we LOVE; will you stand with me?_
---
| [ **STAND WITH ME NOW >>>** ](http://email.m.caitlynjenner.com/c/eJw9jt2OhCAMhZ9G7yC0AsKFF-7s7Hsg4MgGf4IY49svTiabNG36pT3nuE61Qg7A69AhQ2ASOEhEBAq010pr8ewFsOcDJVaczdSakOO1_Ppl8Ynada6nTkiFDKweh1GBsba1zAhsVAOSc462jt2U87ZXTV_hT6nd2yN5eoYleXeLFPYRHtdkTVnPNeWJjOE15bC8SMF16tx2hhjDLtuS5TWbEN8JzLzFMF5d1X5ViMcRXBlvM9TDoIBZQzyTjnDXGKKEkcT6AbTUjQZl72N8lJ6vzf9_fkSpv21u2n7_AVNQWZM)

California deserves better than Gavin Newsom. He's stood by while **thousands** of Californians and their businesses have FLED because they can't take it any longer. **I love this state - I** **don 't want to leave, so either I stay and fight, or I get out of here, and I want to FIGHT.** This isn't going to be easy, but I can't watch our beautiful state crumble under the leadership of Gavin Newsom any longer. name: Team Sarah
subject: re: Sarah Godlewski
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Hey, Peter,

Democrats hold a razor-thin 50-50 majority in the Senate. But Republicans are still creating roadblocks for progress. Legislation like the For the People Act, the Equality Act, and others are being held up because Republican Senators like Ron Johnson **refuse to do their jobs.**

There is a clear path to expanding the Democratic majority in the Senate -- and it starts with electing Sarah Godlewski to replace Ron Johnson. Top election forecasters are already calling Wisconsin a battleground state, and we know that early investments in a grassroots campaign like ours will help us fight back.

Winning won't be easy, however. Ron Johnson has the full support of Donald Trump and Republican special interests. Sarah, on the other hand, isn't taking a dime from corporate PACs or right-wing mega-donors. She’s relying on folks like you giving what you can when you can to support our campaign.

We're facing our June mid-month fundraising deadline on Wednesday -- it’ll be our last deadline before the end of our first quarter in the race. name: Tiffany Smiley
subject: We Must Address Homelessness in WA State
body:
This issue is affecting our children’s safety
---
| | | | | | |
---
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Friends,
Washington State's homeless population is twice as large as the national average.
Why? It's the cumulative result of decades of failed policies that have occurred on Patty Murray's watch.
As you can see in this video I recorded while touring the homeless encampment at the Broadview Thomson K-8 school in Seattle, now our kids aren't even safe from this problem while they are at school.
Parents, students and educators have pleaded with school district and city officials to shut down the encampment because they no longer feel safe.
With fights, drugs, hypodermic needles and weapons just a few feet from the children's playground, it's even led to the school being shut down at times.
But Patty Murray and the other career politicians have done nothing about it.
[Watch the video below on this shocking problem. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s1Evp_qAOvZQ1DIYrCDFyjldtmNeT1Q5m-mbrGYNI5N5HjfFC-w6NQNinGGA4G8YxwD2j3E3KRPmY7y8iimsoPAIC6tZb6ZM8pmY1CQLDxexpyIDZvDxChTKi5LPdtwsxHwwHfhYViT2dJ2gYYaZ6UZDt-yC2-sRtactD23yAzquvwtm3As2cQ==&c=FHjMQ-8Dy9Jp_YrxYJHhPE31FYYUPbIqhq0BrUaq6Yfhuz8HhSL-7A==&ch=89KHTidUIvLWh_Tv47lvBsKLuWHO9udDFn3uy3tQ1xfUlSyW86y3vA==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s1Evp_qAOvZQ1DIYrCDFyjldtmNeT1Q5m-mbrGYNI5N5HjfFC-w6NQNinGGA4G8YxwD2j3E3KRPmY7y8iimsoPAIC6tZb6ZM8pmY1CQLDxexpyIDZvDxChTKi5LPdtwsxHwwHfhYViT2dJ2gYYaZ6UZDt-yC2-sRtactD23yAzquvwtm3As2cQ==&c=FHjMQ-8Dy9Jp_YrxYJHhPE31FYYUPbIqhq0BrUaq6Yfhuz8HhSL-7A==&ch=89KHTidUIvLWh_Tv47lvBsKLuWHO9udDFn3uy3tQ1xfUlSyW86y3vA==)
---
| We must provide help to homeless who suffer from serious mental illness, and especially our homeless veterans. But we cannot allow our children to continue to be placed in danger when they are at school.
This is an issue that I will address when I'm elected to the United States Senate. I will not allow the homeless crisis to continue unabated in our state. We need a true comprehensive approach that provides those living in these encampments with the help they need, but refuses to turn a blind eye to the problem.
Last year, Washington received over $1 billion in federal education funding. On top of that, our state's schools have received another $2.9 billion in COVID-related federal elementary and secondary school emergency relief funding. With that much money available, there's absolutely no excuse for the politicians' failure to address the homeless living at our public schools.
I've tackled problems like this before - when I fought to reform the VA - and I know that they can be solved with perseverance and with all of us working together. [I hope you will consider donating to my campaign today by clik so that we can start addressing problems like this.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s1Evp_qAOvZQ1DIYrCDFyjldtmNeT1Q5m-mbrGYNI5N5HjfFC-w6NZH5sen8sokPu3hHFbtvM8blZqzw7PPDvIi97K_bhURdq5BmjHorcZYhtDufYV3fe72IuOtI6tcN32VsXJMxwnqE6tbyqIqIbztd6YiiLJ6ZWRD491kkkxY8RuAGyaFgTBYhPH8AiHL9NkTnqMg1kK-TbbdhH2UAYsGlt9puX9q6Y8LvlnKgjGQGkuO4nnFoHE451xqS6NklLgrLxh45BFsygaFZXGM1Ng==&c=FHjMQ-8Dy9Jp_YrxYJHhPE31FYYUPbIqhq0BrUaq6Yfhuz8HhSL-7A==&ch=89KHTidUIvLWh_Tv47lvBsKLuWHO9udDFn3uy3tQ1xfUlSyW86y3vA==)
---
| Sincerely,

|
---
| Tiffany Smiley
