name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Ilhan Omar is a Terrorist
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
It is appalling to me that Nancy Pelosi is allowing her to stay in Congress – Nancy even went on the record DEFENDING her. Why is Nancy Pelosi defending a terrorist in her party? Ilhan Omar hates America, she hates Israel, she hates everything that makes our nation free. They give her a pass when she “clarifies” her hate and anti-Semitism, and then they attack Republicans for standing up to their attempt to force tyranny and socialism on this great nation. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c123%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=ciQ99Dajb9Ap9DIwH2bLug&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3271%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mJteraDV9PZmmdu%2fDX9rhA&sysid=1 "Tweet") Fellow Patriot **_Ilhan Omar is a terrorist-supporting member of the Jihad Squad._** It is appalling to me that Nancy Pelosi is allowing her to stay in Congress - Nancy even went on the record DEFENDING her. Why is Nancy Pelosi defending a terrorist in her party? Ilhan Omar hates America, she hates Israel, she hates everything that makes our nation free. They give her a pass when she “clarifies” her hate and anti-Semitism, and then they attack Republicans for standing up to their attempt to force tyranny and socialism on this great nation. This fight in Washington is now a simple choice between right and wrong. Do you side with those who hate our nation while enjoying its benefits, including its protection, or do you side with patriots who know that freedom needs protecting? **[You must decide right now.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3272%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RrN3NZiENL2S0W579SrUQQ&sysid=1 "You must decide right now.")** [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3273%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fmS%2bXCOuYEP0PwLen87saw&sysid=1 "Smile")Ilhan may be the worst, but she is by no means the only person on the left who cheers for lawlessness and terror. **AOC** cheered for protestors holding signs saying, **“Punch that cop.”** **Rashida Talib** has been pictured smiling with a Hezbollah terrorist after she was sworn into Congress in 2019. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3274%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oU097%2fE9ztZ7N3xdOQkypw&sysid=1 "Banner")They HATE our nation and everything it stands for. If Nancy Pelosi refuses to stand up to them, I will. **If you love this nation and want to stop the Squad’s influence in Congress - I need you to SHOW it with an immediate donation. [Taking on the well-funded Squad won’t be easy - but nothing worth doing is.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3285%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kgUjFQpPU%2fq34ZsV4gDlDA&sysid=1 "Taking on the well-funded Squad won’t be easy – but nothing worth
doing is.")** I can no longer look the other way as anti-Semitic and anti-American propaganda is spewed from the halls of Congress. **[Someone needs to stand up and fight. I can’t do it alone- I need your help to counter the radical elements in Washington who want to defund our law enforcement officers and prop up BLM and other terrorists.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3286%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VOrKAiPjjbBKyUxOQ1qRlQ&sysid=1 "Someone needs to stand up and fight. I can’t do it alone – I need
your help to counter the radical elements in Washington who want to defund our law
enforcement officers and prop up BLM and other terrorists.")** Unlike the Jihad Squad, I love America and Israel. I greatly appreciate the police and will never allow our nation to be compared to terrorists or fund them. The Squad is the face of hatred and anti-Semitism. We cannot tolerate their actions, and that’s why I’ve sponsored legislation to recognize the bravery of law enforcement officers who protect us from Black Lives Matter's violence and prevent the Squad from funding their friends in Hamas and other terrorist organizations. **[I will not rest until the Jihad Squad terrorists are kicked out of Congress and no longer a threat to our nation; if every patriot reading this email gave just $62.31, we would have everything we need to stop them.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3287%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZpnY73TOOSxOpzYW1A7PsQ&sysid=1 "I will not rest until the Jihad Squad terrorists are kicked out of Congress
and no longer a threat to our nation; if every patriot reading this email gave
just $62.31, we would have everything we need to stop them.")** **[You need to do your part today and help me do what Nancy Pelosi is afraid to do.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3288%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ePVwZI0PqbY9%2bXNZnDicew&sysid=1 "You need to do your part today and help me do what Nancy Pelosi is afraid
to do.")** Thank you for your support. God Bless America, and God Bless the Nation of Israel. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3289%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tKQOaikCD7lDDcG%2bgh%2bWSA&sysid=1 "Marjorie Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)
---
| **PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC.**
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c123%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=ciQ99Dajb9Ap9DIwH2bLug&sysid=1)

subject: Action for week of June 14th: Must call the Senate, watch a docu-series, & more!
body:
| |
---
It is anticipated that Sen. Schumer will bring S.1, a.k.a. ‘The Corrupt Politicians Act,’ to the Senate floor the week of June 21 – and it is thought that he would need to file notice by Thursday, June 17 – this week. We need to keep the pressure on all Republicans and Sen. Manchin to oppose S.1, and ramp up the fight against H.R. 4, a.k.a. ‘the Pelosi Power Grab bill.’

**Action items for this week include:**
* Call Senators and urge them to oppose S1 & share an op-ed
* Watch the Red, White, & Blueprint episodes about taking on local government
* Reminders about sign-ups and prepping for summer events

See below for details!

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
**Call Your Senators about The Corrupt Politicians Act**
I know it seems like we are stuck on repeat, but that is why the left and the Deep State push, and push, and push, and keep pushing. They are hoping we get bored or tired of doing the work we need to do.

**Even if you’ve called a dozen times already, call again.** Keep calling until this awful bill and all similar bills are dead.

Call both of your Senators, even if they are Democrats, and tell them:

_“My name is ________, and I am calling from [City, State] to urge Senator _________ to vote against S.1. As a constituent, I want legislation that makes it easy to vote, but hard to cheat. S.1 does the opposite and will make it easier to cheat. Please oppose. Thank you.”_

**Resources to read before you call, if you haven’t read them yet.**

You know it’s been a bad week for Kamala Harris when even CNN is saying her first trip abroad was an utter failure...

While we never thought we’d share another CNN article unironically, we were wrong. This week the Biden Administration threw Kamala Harris under the bus and their propaganda outlet, CNN, picked up the story.

[From CNN](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTY1LWVjMDBiN2MwMDUwYjRiNjFhNTNiZWQzNDJkNDczODc0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY25uLmNvbS8yMDIxLzA2LzA4L3BvbGl0aWNzL2thbWFsYS1oYXJyaXMtYm9yZGVyL2luZGV4Lmh0bWw_bWlkPTQzOTIwJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=CF-AAvIhgWOIB3ROz3lOgg): “Administration officials perplexed by Harris’ border answer and worry it will overshadow her trip...”

The article opens saying: “Vice President Kamala Harris endured a rocky first foreign trip since taking office, with sources telling CNN her two-day swing through Mexico and Guatemala left some administration officials quietly perplexed about what they perceive as her bumpy answers to questions about whether she will go to the US-Mexico border.

“Several sources say there was a real hope inside the White House that Harris' first trip abroad would be a success, and worry that what looked like ill-prepared answers to that inevitable question would overshadow it...”

The article goes on to try to redeem the VP’s trip, but the message from the opening of the article was clear. Harris’s trip was a disaster, White House officials know it, and they're making clear that she's the one to blame, not Biden.

The viral moment of course was when NBC's Lester Holt pressed her on her absence at the border [and her response was just awful](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTY1LWVjMDBiN2MwMDUwYjRiNjFhNTNiZWQzNDJkNDczODc0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9UUFBhdHJpb3RzL3N0YXR1cy8xNDAyMzQwNTYxOTg2NzU2NjI0P21pZD00MzkyMCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=9tdUgltcnX8Z-azOOx0Q1w).

**Share Bill Pascoe’s Article**
One of the hidden parts of The Corrupt Politicians Act is The DISCLOSE Act, that piece of legislation that Democrats have been trying to pass for _years_. They want to weaponize political donations so that conservatives are afraid to donate to causes we support.

[Read and share Bill Pascoe’s op-ed about this,](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTY1LWVjMDBiN2MwMDUwYjRiNjFhNTNiZWQzNDJkNDczODc0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9pbnNpZGVzb3VyY2VzLmNvbS9zaGVsZG9uLXdoaXRlaG91c2UtYS1tb2Rlcm4tZGF5LWFsYWJhbWEtYnVsbHkvP21pZD00MzkyMCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=oHTCKPbdR_QVyzUJotRCug) so that more people know about what’s in The Corrupt Politicians Act.

While this week was a rocky week for Kamala Harris, it was an even rockier week for progressives’ beloved ideology: Critical Race Theory (CRT).

Multiple groups took aim at the hateful, racist ideology, moving to ostracize it from the American education system.

First up, on a national scale, Senators Rick Scott, Marsha Blackburn and Mike Braun introduced a resolution condemning CRT in K-12 schools.

[Breitbart News](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTY1LWVjMDBiN2MwMDUwYjRiNjFhNTNiZWQzNDJkNDczODc0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJlaXRiYXJ0LmNvbS9wb2xpdGljcy8yMDIxLzA2LzA3L3NlbnMtc2NvdHQtYmxhY2tidXJuLWFuZC1icmF1bi1pbnRyb2R1Y2UtcmVzb2x1dGlvbi10by1jb25kZW1uLWNyaXRpY2FsLXJhY2UtdGhlb3J5Lz9taWQ9NDM5MjAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=xHS98YSfTuHGiW4vX9mriw) had the story: “The lawmakers, via resolution, [S.Res.246](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTY1LWVjMDBiN2MwMDUwYjRiNjFhNTNiZWQzNDJkNDczODc0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE3dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3Mvc2VuYXRlLXJlc29sdXRpb24vMjQ2P21pZD00MzkyMCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=wArCGgXJq-L0EZonoP8Kig), express that the Critical Race Theory, described as ‘an academic concept based on the belief that racism is embedded in American society,’ serves primarily as a divisive and ‘prejudicial ideological tool rather than an educational tool, and should not be taught in K-12 classrooms as a way to teach students to judge individuals based on sex, race, ethnicity, or national origin.’”

“The far-left wants Americans to believe that our nation is inherently racist and bad. They want to discredit the values America was founded on. They’re wrong,” Scott, chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC) said in a statement.

“We can’t stand by and allow ’woke’ liberals to divide our nation. Students in Florida and every state across this nation deserve better and I’m proud to lead my colleagues today in a resolution to stand up against this dangerous policy,” he added.

Critical Race Theory, Blackburn added, has “no place in American schools,” as it is based “in the destructive ideal of inherent racism and will teach our children to judge and self-segregate based solely on skin color.”

“This resolution is an important step to prevent the far left from pushing their radical political agenda in our classrooms,” she said.

Braun agreed, emphasizing that children need to know the “fundamental values of our country are liberty, equality, and opportunity for all – not racism and oppression.”

On a local level, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis took direct action against the divisive ideology. [Governor DeSantis banned the teaching of Critical Race Theory and the “1619 Project” from all Florida public schools!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTY1LWVjMDBiN2MwMDUwYjRiNjFhNTNiZWQzNDJkNDczODc0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9UUFBhdHJpb3RzL3N0YXR1cy8xNDAzMzc3MjM0MzcxNjYxODI3Lz9taWQ9NDM5MjAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=R7sa3-EQHeYqXcH0ut-c9w) Thank you, Governor DeSantis!

**Watch & Share Episodes of _The Red, White, and Blueprint_**
This is an amazing, entertaining docu-series filmed in real time. Watch as real citizens in one California county rise up against the corruption of their local government. The episodes are free to watch and come out monthly, and they are fun to watch! It’s also a really neat way to learn from what they are doing so that you can do the same in your own local area. They will release episode #4 on the last Friday in June, so you have time to watch the first three and catch up!

**[Watch the trailer](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTY1LWVjMDBiN2MwMDUwYjRiNjFhNTNiZWQzNDJkNDczODc0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTE%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9FLUdQU0g3SGVFYz9taWQ9NDM5MjAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=PBH6xq2A9aBoZZ3XSFVCtg)**

**[Watch the episodes](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTY1LWVjMDBiN2MwMDUwYjRiNjFhNTNiZWQzNDJkNDczODc0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTI%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGhlcmVkd2hpdGVhbmRibHVlcHJpbnQuY29tL21lZGlhLmh0bWw_bWlkPTQzOTIwJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=EDjcgOrZsOq8Z6rbgD99Rg)**

Since the moment Joe Biden took office, we have warned that his radical, reckless economic agenda will undoubtedly lead to inflation.

Time and time again, we were assured by Democrats that this wouldn’t happen and that our economy would be better than it was under Trump.

Per usual, they were wrong.

Just this week we learned that consumer prices surged 5% in May, the fastest pace since August of 2008. [As the Washington Examiner put it:](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTY1LWVjMDBiN2MwMDUwYjRiNjFhNTNiZWQzNDJkNDczODc0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTM%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbmV4YW1pbmVyLmNvbS9vcGluaW9uL2VkaXRvcmlhbHMvZnJpZGF5LWVkaXRvcmlhbC1iaWRlbnMtaW5mbGF0aW9uLW1vbnN0ZXItYXJpc2VzP21pZD00MzkyMCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=0l5jvABWecdXY9pZCdR8EA) “Biden’s inflation monster arises...”

clean_body: | | It is anticipated that Sen. Schumer will bring S.1, a.k.a. ‘The Corrupt Politicians Act,’ to the Senate floor the week of June 21 – and it is thought that he would need to file notice by Thursday, June 17 – this week. We need to keep the pressure on all Republicans and Sen. Manchin to oppose S.1, and ramp up the fight against H.R. 4, a.k.a. ‘the Pelosi Power Grab bill.’ Action items for this week include: Call Senators and urge them to oppose S1 & share an op-ed Watch the Red, White, & Blueprint episodes about taking on local government Reminders about sign-ups and prepping for summer events See below for details! Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it. | Call Your Senators about The Corrupt Politicians Act I know it seems like we are stuck on repeat, but that is why the left and the Deep State push, and push, and push, and keep pushing. They are hoping we get bored or tired of doing the work we need to do. Even if you’ve called a dozen times already, call again. Keep calling until this awful bill and all similar bills are dead. Call both of your Senators, even if they are Democrats, and tell them: “My name is ____, and I am calling from [City, State] to urge Senator _____ to vote against S.1. As a constituent, I want legislation that makes it easy to vote, but hard to cheat. S.1 does the opposite and will make it easier to cheat. Please oppose. Thank you.” Resources to read before you call, if you haven’t read them yet. about the defending the filibuster | You know it’s been a bad week for Kamala Harris when even CNN is saying her first trip abroad was an utter failure... While we never thought we’d share another CNN article unironically, we were wrong. This week the Biden Administration threw Kamala Harris under the bus and their propaganda outlet, CNN, picked up the story. : “Administration officials perplexed by Harris’ border answer and worry it will overshadow her trip...” The article opens saying: “Vice President Kamala Harris endured a rocky first foreign trip since taking office, with sources telling CNN her two-day swing through Mexico and Guatemala left some administration officials quietly perplexed about what they perceive as her bumpy answers to questions about whether she will go to the US-Mexico border. “Several sources say there was a real hope inside the White House that Harris' first trip abroad would be a success, and worry that what looked like ill-prepared answers to that inevitable question would overshadow it...” The article goes on to try to redeem the VP’s trip, but the message from the opening of the article was clear. Harris’s trip was a disaster, White House officials know it, and they're making clear that she's the one to blame, not Biden. The viral moment of course was when NBC's Lester Holt pressed her on her absence at the border . | Share Bill Pascoe’s Article One of the hidden parts of The Corrupt Politicians Act is The DISCLOSE Act, that piece of legislation that Democrats have been trying to pass for years. They want to weaponize political donations so that conservatives are afraid to donate to causes we support. so that more people know about what’s in The Corrupt Politicians Act. | While this week was a rocky week for Kamala Harris, it was an even rockier week for progressives’ beloved ideology: Critical Race Theory (CRT). Multiple groups took aim at the hateful, racist ideology, moving to ostracize it from the American education system. First up, on a national scale, Senators Rick Scott, Marsha Blackburn and Mike Braun introduced a resolution condemning CRT in K-12 schools. had the story: “The lawmakers, via resolution, , express that the Critical Race Theory, described as ‘an academic concept based on the belief that racism is embedded in American society,’ serves primarily as a divisive and ‘prejudicial ideological tool rather than an educational tool, and should not be taught in K-12 classrooms as a way to teach students to judge individuals based on sex, race, ethnicity, or national origin.’” “The far-left wants Americans to believe that our nation is inherently racist and bad. They want to discredit the values America was founded on. They’re wrong,” Scott, chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC) said in a statement. “We can’t stand by and allow ’woke’ liberals to divide our nation. Students in Florida and every state across this nation deserve better and I’m proud to lead my colleagues today in a resolution to stand up against this dangerous policy,” he added. Critical Race Theory, Blackburn added, has “no place in American schools,” as it is based “in the destructive ideal of inherent racism and will teach our children to judge and self-segregate based solely on skin color.” “This resolution is an important step to prevent the far left from pushing their radical political agenda in our classrooms,” she said. Braun agreed, emphasizing that children need to know the “fundamental values of our country are liberty, equality, and opportunity for all – not racism and oppression.” On a local level, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis took direct action against the divisive ideology. Thank you, Governor DeSantis! | Watch & Share Episodes of The Red, White, and Blueprint This is an amazing, entertaining docu-series filmed in real time. Watch as real citizens in one California county rise up against the corruption of their local government. The episodes are free to watch and come out monthly, and they are fun to watch! It’s also a really neat way to learn from what they are doing so that you can do the same in your own local area. They will release episode #4 on the last Friday in June, so you have time to watch the first three and catch up! | Since the moment Joe Biden took office, we have warned that his radical, reckless economic agenda will undoubtedly lead to inflation. Time and time again, we were assured by Democrats that this wouldn’t happen and that our economy would be better than it was under Trump. Per usual, they were wrong. Just this week we learned that consumer prices surged 5% in May, the fastest pace since August of 2008. “Biden’s inflation monster arises...” | Reminders: Sign up forms and research to do Eternal Vigilance Project If you haven’t yet signed up for the Eternal Vigilance Project, please sign up this week! There are two levels available. Keeper of the Republic of has fewer commitments than Champion of the Republic, so pick the level that matches your availability, and while even Keeper might be a challenge, I encourage you to try to meet that challenge. Sign up at the links below. | Running for Local Office If you’re interested in running for local office, especially if you’d like to run in the 2022 election, now is the time to let us know because you must get trained in 2021! | Nationwide Summer Events The grassroots approved the upcoming events listed below, and the sooner you get yours planned, the better your events will be! letting us know whether you will organize or attend these summer events. | Researching Your Local Government See our website for the information you will want to have on-hand. | | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. © 2021 80 M St SE, First Floor, Washington, D.C. 20003 | **

name: Karen Bass
subject: McConnell meant what he said. That's why I'm not taking any chances.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
My team has been reaching out about our mid-month goal, friend. Hitting our goal will help us get to where we need to be before our FEC end-of-quarter deadline. Now, I want to explain _why_ it's so crucial we turn out strong numbers this quarter.

I'm sure you've seen or heard what Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell admitted:

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/M86-KH2lQwC8w5-rBnOHj_KjERMWjr5XWBP89CAC2Dc=/jXDdl5CUYmc4-3EnRhAJlBxGTnILGC0WaQ_dsd8iYIw=?gpsid=39_132_19358&refcode=em21_210614_mm2_fnd_gq_act_kb_prpl_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210614_mm2_fnd_gq_act_kb_prpl_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)
---

_Source: DCCC_
**Donald Trump may no longer be our president, but Trump 's America is still festering in Congress. His allies are determined to block progress every step of the way, and McConnell isn't even trying to hide it. **

The House majority is one of President Joe Biden's most crucial assets, and it's why McConnell and national Republicans are gearing up to take it back in the midterm elections. I won't let that happen -- not when justice and the integrity of our democracy is on the line. But I can't face the odds alone.

**[Our team set a mid-month goal of raising $3,000 by tonight at midnight to help us prepare for the fight to defend the House majority. As of this morning, we're just a few donations away from hitting our goal -- can I count on you to chip in what you can before tonight's deadline to push us over the edge?](https://act.myngp.com/el/M86-KH2lQwC8w5-rBnOHj_KjERMWjr5XWBP89CAC2Dc=/jXDdl5CUYmc4-3EnRhAJlBxGTnILGC0WaQ_dsd8iYIw=?gpsid=39_132_19358&refcode=em21_210614_mm2_fnd_gq_act_kb_prpl_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210614_mm2_fnd_gq_act_kb_prpl_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[DONATE $5](https://act.myngp.com/el/M86-KH2lQwC8w5-rBnOHj_KjERMWjr5XWBP89CAC2Dc=/jXDdl5CUYmc4-3EnRhAJlBxGTnILGC0WaQ_dsd8iYIw=?gpsid=39_132_19358&refcode=em21_210614_mm2_fnd_gq_act_kb_prpl_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210614_mm2_fnd_gq_act_kb_prpl_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&express_lane=true&amount=5)

---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.myngp.com/el/M86-KH2lQwC8w5-rBnOHj_KjERMWjr5XWBP89CAC2Dc=/jXDdl5CUYmc4-3EnRhAJlBxGTnILGC0WaQ_dsd8iYIw=?gpsid=39_132_19358&refcode=em21_210614_mm2_fnd_gq_act_kb_prpl_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210614_mm2_fnd_gq_act_kb_prpl_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)

The Democratic majority is at a huge disadvantage in the midterm elections. And it doesn't help that Republicans are gerrymandering districts, passing voter suppression laws, and blocking election reform legislation in Congress to try and rig the system in their favor.

Politicians don't get to choose who wins elections. The people do. We made that clear when we certified the 2020 presidential election results in January. But Trump's allies are still at large, and they're prepared to do, say, and spend whatever it takes to take the House. It's why we're setting fundraising goals like this one to make sure we're ready to fight back.

**[I hope I can count on your support before tonight's deadline. Please, donate what you can before we close the books.](https://act.myngp.com/el/M86-KH2lQwC8w5-rBnOHj_KjERMWjr5XWBP89CAC2Dc=/jXDdl5CUYmc4-3EnRhAJlBxGTnILGC0WaQ_dsd8iYIw=?gpsid=39_132_19358&refcode=em21_210614_mm2_fnd_gq_act_kb_prpl_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210614_mm2_fnd_gq_act_kb_prpl_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**

In solidarity,

Karen

Karen Bass started as a community organizer, so she knows just how much a $5 or $10 donation can do. Help fuel her movement to make social and economic justice for all a reality by chipping in today.
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/M86-KH2lQwC8w5-rBnOHj_KjERMWjr5XWBP89CAC2Dc=/jXDdl5CUYmc4-3EnRhAJlBxGTnILGC0WaQ_dsd8iYIw=?gpsid=39_132_19358&refcode=em21_210614_mm2_fnd_gq_act_kb_prpl_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210614_mm2_fnd_gq_act_kb_prpl_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)

If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: The Democratic majority is at a huge disadvantage in the midterm elections. And it doesn't help that Republicans are gerrymandering districts, passing voter suppression laws, and blocking election reform legislation in Congress to try and rig the system in their favor. Politicians don't get to choose who wins elections. The people do. We made that clear when we certified the 2020 presidential election results in January. But Trump's allies are still at large, and they're prepared to do, say, and spend whatever it takes to take the House. It's why we're setting fundraising goals like this one to make sure we're ready to fight back. In solidarity, Karen Karen Bass started as a community organizer, so she knows just how much a $5 or $10 donation can do. Help fuel her movement to make social and economic justice for all a reality by chipping in today. Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress Bass for Congress 918 Pennsylvania Ave SE Washington, DC 20003 United States We rely on this email to communicate with this grassroots team, but if you no longer want to receive our emails, please =.

name: Hala Ayala
subject: This will only take a minute (or two, tops!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hala for Virginia
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30800904/290665377/40582973?refcode=hla-em-210614-survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjA5OTEyOC01YWNkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JfQA_ijwY53MRL5sVPTSnw_gycky8ffhBNSsj2EnNRk=&emci=dd099128-5acd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=e2099128-5acd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18668076)
---
Hi Peter — One of the best parts about campaigning is getting to talk with folks from across the Commonwealth and hear their personal stories, concerns, and hopes for a better future. But all too often, what politicians hear in one ear goes right out the other, resulting in a government that doesn’t listen to us, look like us, share our experiences, or fight for our needs. **Well, Peter, that’s not me.** I understand what so many Virginians have been through because I’ve been through it too. As a single mother, a Medicaid recipient, and an adult student, I know what it’s like to worry about keeping a roof over your family’s head and food on the table. Peter, I know my story isn’t unique, and I know every single one of you has a story worth hearing and a future worth fighting for. Now that we have won the Democratic nomination for Lt. Governor, I want to hear from you so I can best fight for you in the weeks and months ahead. **[So, will you take a minute (or two, tops!) to share your story and your top priorities with me right now? I’d love to hear from you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30800905/290665378/665713308?refcode=hla-em-210614-survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjA5OTEyOC01YWNkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JfQA_ijwY53MRL5sVPTSnw_gycky8ffhBNSsj2EnNRk=&emci=dd099128-5acd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=e2099128-5acd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18668076)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30800906/290665379/665713308?refcode=hla-em-210614-survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjA5OTEyOC01YWNkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JfQA_ijwY53MRL5sVPTSnw_gycky8ffhBNSsj2EnNRk=&emci=dd099128-5acd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=e2099128-5acd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18668076)
---
Thanks for sharing your thoughts with me today — I can’t wait to read your responses.
— Hala
As a lifelong Virginian, Hala understands where we’ve come from and embodies the diversity of our future. She’s running for Lt. Governor because she knows we have the power to move forward together, and she knows what it’ll take to get it done. **Will you pitch in to join our movement for a brighter future for all?** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30800907/290665380/1546086982?refcode=hla-em-210614-survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjA5OTEyOC01YWNkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JfQA_ijwY53MRL5sVPTSnw_gycky8ffhBNSsj2EnNRk=)

body:

| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WXvnmyz1Jf2icCIF9Obw2WsaJeAX8doxM4KMyFijpyHaB3Pm7bpokMVFxDp0LboAZYIquW3-jmwwJGTDvUKqCsXWhzg5LWu53X2sseZKhx73a_QGJi7sSbUuJ90FTmUj1HRHvXI-NfA_MkYqoJiJHJ3LAZ13vhRtOWTi0RrQLP8LGVd3z8GSqYMLz15eBspR&c=MCCEe-LTwe0N-jtdLAllzcA0aV_oK_mpNsH-BAlUPzcNxBkK_9CjOQ==&ch=YIOl1xsoeuXYRkRwLRlt2cFAel-qbKjSjCavgxTfokP2cd4zJIGovg==)

| Peter,
Just look at the latest brilliant mind who has chosen to try and take my seat in Congress. Fired and disgraced COVID liar Rebekah Jones \- who falsely tried to smear our great Governor Ron DeSantis with lies about data manipulation - is continuing her crusade by running against me in the primary election.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WXvnmyz1Jf2icCIF9Obw2WsaJeAX8doxM4KMyFijpyHaB3Pm7bpokMVFxDp0LboAZYIquW3-jmwwJGTDvUKqCsXWhzg5LWu53X2sseZKhx73a_QGJi7sSbUuJ90FTmUj1HRHvXI-NfA_MkYqoJiJHJ3LAZ13vhRtOWTi0RrQLP8LGVd3z8GSqYMLz15eBspR&c=MCCEe-LTwe0N-jtdLAllzcA0aV_oK_mpNsH-BAlUPzcNxBkK_9CjOQ==&ch=YIOl1xsoeuXYRkRwLRlt2cFAel-qbKjSjCavgxTfokP2cd4zJIGovg==)

| Jones had to be fired from her position at the Florida Department of Health for insubordination and allegedly stole private health data on the way out. She falsely claimed time and again that Florida was hiding COVID-19 deaths. Governor DeSantis even called her the Typhoid Mary of COVID disinformation.
She must have been too busy peddling lies and making up coronavirus stories to realize that Florida's panhandle is a conservative stronghold that does NOT want a RINO doing the bidding for CNN. To this disgraced fake news media darling, I say "good luck!"
All the proof we need that our America First movement is on the right path for the country can be found in the detractors who try in vain to stop us...
---
| | | [KEEP PUTTING AMERICA FIRST](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WXvnmyz1Jf2icCIF9Obw2WsaJeAX8doxM4KMyFijpyHaB3Pm7bpokMVFxDp0LboAZYIquW3-jmwwJGTDvUKqCsXWhzg5LWu53X2sseZKhx73a_QGJi7sSbUuJ90FTmUj1HRHvXI-NfA_MkYqoJiJHJ3LAZ13vhRtOWTi0RrQLP8LGVd3z8GSqYMLz15eBspR&c=MCCEe-LTwe0N-jtdLAllzcA0aV_oK_mpNsH-BAlUPzcNxBkK_9CjOQ==&ch=YIOl1xsoeuXYRkRwLRlt2cFAel-qbKjSjCavgxTfokP2cd4zJIGovg==)
---
| It's worth remembering that though Rebekah Jones peddled more lies than even Dr. Anthony Fauci, the propagandists at CNN and other mainstream media outlets were quick to run with her story.
They don't care about the truth - they care about smearing anyone who dares to challenge the Establishment status-quo.
[Let's continue to stand strong against these mainstream media hacks, and hold them accountable for empowering proven liars like Rebekah Jones!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WXvnmyz1Jf2icCIF9Obw2WsaJeAX8doxM4KMyFijpyHaB3Pm7bpokMVFxDp0LboAZYIquW3-jmwwJGTDvUKqCsXWhzg5LWu53X2sseZKhx73a_QGJi7sSbUuJ90FTmUj1HRHvXI-NfA_MkYqoJiJHJ3LAZ13vhRtOWTi0RrQLP8LGVd3z8GSqYMLz15eBspR&c=MCCEe-LTwe0N-jtdLAllzcA0aV_oK_mpNsH-BAlUPzcNxBkK_9CjOQ==&ch=YIOl1xsoeuXYRkRwLRlt2cFAel-qbKjSjCavgxTfokP2cd4zJIGovg==)

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Peter, Just look at the latest brilliant mind who has chosen to try and take my seat in Congress. Fired and disgraced COVID liar Rebekah Jones \- who falsely tried to smear our great Governor Ron DeSantis with lies about data manipulation - is continuing her crusade by running against me in the primary election. | == | Jones had to be fired from her position at the Florida Department of Health for insubordination and allegedly stole private health data on the way out. She falsely claimed time and again that Florida was hiding COVID-19 deaths. Governor DeSantis even called her the Typhoid Mary of COVID disinformation. She must have been too busy peddling lies and making up coronavirus stories to realize that Florida's panhandle is a conservative stronghold that does NOT want a RINO doing the bidding for CNN. To this disgraced fake news media darling, I say "good luck!" All the proof we need that our America First movement is on the right path for the country can be found in the detractors who try in vain to stop us... | | | == | It's worth remembering that though Rebekah Jones peddled more lies than even Dr. Anthony Fauci, the propagandists at CNN and other mainstream media outlets were quick to run with her story. They don't care about the truth - they care about smearing anyone who dares to challenge the Establishment status-quo. == | | | == | Thanks for not bowing down, | == | Matt Gaetz | == == | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ | Copyright (C) 2021 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. subject: ALERT: Mitch McConnell is back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Mitch McConnell's golden ticket to the Senate | | |
---
Did you hear the news, friend? In his latest attempt to unseat Maggie and gain control of the Senate, **Mitch McConnell is personally recruiting his top pick to run for Senate in New Hampshire.** This isn't the first time McConnell has meddled in New Hampshire politics and it won't be the last. Just a few weeks ago, the Senate minority leader unleashed a massive ad campaign targeting Maggie. McConnell knows that New Hampshire is THE toss-up state in 2022 – and he has his eyes on Maggie's seat. That's why we're setting an **emergency mid-month fundraising goal of $15,000.** **[If McConnell is going to target our campaign with dark money, ads, and potential opponents, we need the resources to compete. name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: (bump) Hey friend, can I give you a call?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Hey there —
One of the hardest parts about running for office is asking folks to invest their hard-earned dollars in your campaign.
Having come from a working poor family myself, I know what a big decision it is to donate to a cause you care about.
That’s why I’m so humbled and grateful to have support from so many grassroots donors — and I’m hoping you’ll become one of them today, friend.
It means so much that you chose to join the movement we’re building to make a democracy that works for working people like you and me.
I’d love to personally call and thank you and every single person who has joined our campaign, but traveling across the Commonwealth talking to voters is pretty time-consuming.
So I set aside some time this month and asked my team to select a handful of folks who contribute through this email for my partner Dr. Matt and me to call.
**We’d love the chance to hear what’s on your mind and thank you personally for joining our fight for working people. So what do you say?**
[Could you make your first donation to our campaign now for a chance to be one of the grassroots donors Dr. Matt and I call?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30802800/290671525/-347207331?refcode2=d9751e79-60cd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210614-resend&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTc1MWU3OS02MGNkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fgNzJoUvfRJyI-4HxiTfCX4rIEArOu_3qX15E5Imshw=)
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30802803/290671526/-347207331?refcode2=d9751e79-60cd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210614-resend&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTc1MWU3OS02MGNkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fgNzJoUvfRJyI-4HxiTfCX4rIEArOu_3qX15E5Imshw=)**
I hope I can give you a ring soon. Thanks for everything you do to support our campaign.
Best,
Malcolm

* * *

clean_body: Hey there — One of the hardest parts about running for office is asking folks to invest their hard-earned dollars in your campaign. Having come from a working poor family myself, I know what a big decision it is to donate to a cause you care about. That’s why I’m so humbled and grateful to have support from so many grassroots donors — and I’m hoping you’ll become one of them today, friend. It means so much that you chose to join the movement we’re building to make a democracy that works for working people like you and me. I’d love to personally call and thank you and every single person who has joined our campaign, but traveling across the Commonwealth talking to voters is pretty time-consuming. So I set aside some time this month and asked my team to select a handful of folks who contribute through this email for my partner Dr. Matt and me to call. We’d love the chance to hear what’s on your mind and thank you personally for joining our fight for working people. So what do you say? = = I hope I can give you a ring soon. Thanks for everything you do to support our campaign. Best, Malcolm * Paid for by Malcolm PAC Malcolm PAC PO Box 22395 Philadelphia, PA 19110 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Ann Kirkpatrick
subject: I’m FED UP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Moms Fed Up (www
body:
Every day, Congress makes decisions that directly affect our children and families |
---
| [ ](https://act.momsfedup.org/go/67?t=1&akid=7%2E32846%2Eck8NKh)
---
Hey, it’s Ann.

You may know that women make up only 27% of Congress. But did you know that moms with young children make up less than 10%? It’s downright shameful if you ask me.

Every day, Congress makes decisions that directly affect our children and families -- _and moms get almost no say._ [**I’m FED UP.**](https://act.momsfedup.org/go/68?t=2&akid=7%2E32846%2Eck8NKh)

That’s why I’m starting a new organization -- Moms Fed Up -- dedicated to securing moms the funding they need to successfully run for office.

With your help, we’ll elect moms nationwide and enact the policies we deserve to keep families secure, happy, and healthy.
[**Are you FED UP? I am! Chip in $5 now to help me elect more moms to office >>**](https://act.momsfedup.org/go/68?t=3&akid=7%2E32846%2Eck8NKh)

But did you know that moms with young children make up less than 10%? It’s downright shameful if you ask me. Every day, Congress makes decisions that directly affect our children and families -- and moms get almost no say. That’s why I’m starting a new organization -- Moms Fed Up -- dedicated to securing moms the funding they need to successfully run for office. To mark the occasion, we’ve been reflecting on the great four years Kansas saw under President Trump’s leadership. name: Patrick Morrisey
subject: The AG Wants to Hear from YOU
body:
| | | | Share your thoughts. Help Defend America.
---
---
Dear Peter,
I want to thank all the great patriots who are stepping up to spread the word about our Defend America initiative. Everyday, we are working to hold the Biden Administration accountable for their overreaching regulations and radical executive actions.
Our movement relies upon your input to maximize its potential. That is why, today, we are asking if you would take just one minute and fill out a survey on your top political issues.

clean_body: | | | | Share your thoughts. Help Defend America. Dear Peter, I want to thank all the great patriots who are stepping up to spread the word about our Defend America initiative. Everyday, we are working to hold the Biden Administration accountable for their overreaching regulations and radical executive actions. Our movement relies upon your input to maximize its potential. That is why, today, we are asking if you would take just one minute and fill out a survey on your top political issues. We would be grateful for your participation. Thank you. Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey West Virginia Attorney General | Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Morrisey 2020, Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. name: Erica Smith HQ
subject: FWD: Required by federal law to report how much money our campaign raised over the past three months
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
We don’t have a rolodex of well-connected Democratic donors to turn to.
#
Hey, we wanted to bump this email to the top of your inbox. [**Erica is counting on us to have her back. Will you make your first $5 contribution to Erica Smith for U.S. Senate before our public FEC fundraising deadline?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2842?refcode=em20210614-173&t=1&akid=173%2E3698%2EJQgWuP)
Your support will prove that there is a massive coalition behind Erica and our moral movement for bold, progressive change.
— Team Erica
\----------Forwarded message---------
From: Erica Smith HQ <info@ericaforus.com>
Date: Friday, Jun 11, 2021
Subject: Required by federal law to report how much money our campaign raised over the past three months
The FEC is already counting down the days until the end of Q2.
**In a matter of weeks, Erica Smith will be required by federal law to report how much money our campaign raised over the past three months.**
Once our numbers go public, everyone and anyone will make judgements about the strength and viability of our scrappy North Carolina campaign.
But unlike all the moderate candidates for Senate in 2022, right now **Erica doesn’t have the backing of the Democratic Establishment.** We don’t have a rolodex of well-connected Democratic donors to turn to.
Instead, we’re relying on you. Erica is not the establishment candidate, but the people’s candidate.
[**_You’ve never donated to our campaign before. Can we count on you to make your very first donation of $5 or more to Erica Smith for U.S. Senate before the Q2 deadline? Your donation has a direct and immediate impact on electing North Carolina’s first Black woman senator and posting a strong fundraising number by the end of Q2._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2842?refcode=em20210614-173&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=173%2E3698%2EJQgWuP)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2842?refcode=em20210614-173&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=173%2E3698%2EJQgWuP)**
Thanks for hearing us out,
Erica Smith HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210614-173-footer&t=23&refcode2=173_3698_JQgWuP&akid=173%2E3698%2EJQgWuP)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=173%2E3698%2EJQgWuP)

clean_body: | | | | I want YOU to be the first to see it. Friend, Our campaign just released its FIRST TV ad! And I want YOU to be the first to see it! Growing up, it wasn’t always easy, my parents were homeless for awhile but tough times made me who I am today. I am a proud America First Conservative. That means standing up for the Unborn, and protecting our 2nd-Amendment rights. I am proud to raise my 5 children with those same values. The DC Insiders don’t like me because I’ve spent my career fighting against taxpayer fraud, waste and abuse. But that’s ok, I am NOT running for them, I am running for YOU. It’s time Alaska finally had a Senator who represented OUR values and most importantly who will show up and fight to defend our Jobs, Energy Industry and our way of life. I realize that taking on the DC Insiders won’t be easy. The Swamp is ready to outspend us every step of the way. But with your YOUR support, we can reach voters all across Alaska and spread a positive message of new leadership and fresh ideas. I want to make sure every Alaskan knows that they have someone running for them. For Alaska, Kelly P.S. -- Team Kelly needs Conservatives like you to join the fight! kellyforak.com | | | | ==

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Bring in the clowns!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Biden's people interfering |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e94d35fe4e&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

You know what? Bring in the clowns.

**Well – that’s what’s happening anyway in Arizona.**

_With 100% of the ballots counted in America’s Audit in Maricopa County, the Democrats are getting nervous and the clown show is beginning._

[_Donate TODAY to protect America’s and Arizona’s elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0c4166b4d2&e=44b8c466b0)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=70da5a014a&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| My name is Mark Finchem. I am the ORIGINAL “Election Integrity” Conservative, a proud Trump supporter, a former policeman, firefighter, and paramedic – and a patriot leading the charge in fighting election fraud, starting right here in Arizona!

**We have been fighting for a long time, overcoming legal challenges and attacks by the media for simply wanting to do an audit of the election – a right of the state of Arizona!**

_We demanded help in ensuring the sanctity of the American ballot but where was the Department of Justice then?_

**Nowhere to be found.**

But now that we are homing in on one of the biggest frauds in American history?

**Well, Attorney General Merrick Garland said it all:**

**_Merrick Garland said that the DoJ will examine any audits “to ensure they abide by federal statutory requirements to protect election records and avoid intimidation of voters.”_**

Additionally, he has already stated there will be guidance published to make sure that mail in voting and early voting are protected.

**So, let’s be clear here. We have the Department of Justice – before the audit is even completed – stating that they will make it their mission to defend two proven sources of voter fraud, early voting and mail-in ballots?**

_So you won’t get involved to protect the ballot, but you’ll get involved to destroy it?_

**Yep, bring in the clowns.**

_Even though we are making tremendous strides here in Arizona, we are a long way from ensuring the integrity of the American ballot. _

**_This is why I am running for Arizona Secretary of State. I will oversee and protect the ballot in one of the most crucial states for the electoral college._**

[But I cannot do it without your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=fc2ab2b22f&e=44b8c466b0)

I am writing you today to join one of the strongest, most exciting grassroots movement in history.

**While I am helping lead the charge, I am not the only one fighting back against Merrick Garland and these clowns!**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8cf9fc8f39&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **Arizona Senator Wendy Rogers responded with fire,_a_**** _s did I._**

Political swamp creatures should never be allowed to break the law to further their own political interests.

**So sorry, Merrick, we’re not going to handle this with kid gloves when the Audit proves successful.**

We are in the middle of a movement of historical proportions fighting back against one of the largest racketeering schemes in the history of America.

**I’m sure if Crooked Merrick wants to look at the Democrats’ handling of the election, he will find plenty of convictions to meet his quota.**

_Will you join our movement?_

[_Donate TODAY to join the movement for Election Integrity and protecting the Sanctity of the Ballot!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d20497990f&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| My name is Mark Finchem, and I am the fighter that Arizona needs.

**Arizona has been spit on and used as a political tool by the Democrats.**

**_Where has Arizona’s voice gone? It can’t be found in the sea of Leftist Corruption, protected by the likes of Crooked Merrick Garland._**

It’s about time for a change.

**We can’t let the Democrats get away with stealing the election. **

**_Not this time. Not ever._**

This is a clown show and it’s time for the curtain call.

[_Donate TODAY to protect our elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=de765c1876&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=32e6d57460&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=cb79ce5b71&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=236ba66d58) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=236ba66d58).

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Which do you choose?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, Happy Pride Month!
This month, we have an incredible opportunity to not only celebrate LGBTQIA+ people but to finally guarantee their full civil rights and equality in America.**We can do that right now if we abolish the Jim Crow filibuster and pass the Equality Act through the Senate.**
[**We need to work twice as hard to defeat the filibuster so we can deliver progress to the people — and it starts with supporters like you helping us build a movement big enough to achieve this change. Can you rush a contribution of $3 or more to help fight for the Equality Act and to get us closer to our mid-month goal of $10,000 today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210614?refcode=em20210614-374&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&refcode2=374_420207_gSlpYL&akid=374%2E420207%2EgSlpYL)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210614?refcode=em20210614-374&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=374_420207_gSlpYL&akid=374%2E420207%2EgSlpYL)**
We've made so much progress on LGBTQIA+ rights over the last decade. But twenty-nine states do not have laws that explicitly shield Americans from discrimination based on sexual orientation or gender identity — all the while, an alarming number of disgusting anti-trans bills have been introduced and passed by Republicans all across the country. We must quickly fight back against them.
This fight to pass the Equality Act is deeply personal for my family and me. I'm the proud mom of an incredible trans kid, and I know how beautiful it is when trans and non-binary people can live freely as themselves and free from discrimination.
**But that freedom cannot be fully realized until we guarantee real equality and civil rights to every LGBTQIA+ person in this country, regardless of where they live. I am proud that the House did our part to pass the Equality Act — now, it's the Senate's turn to act with the urgency this policy deserves. They must end the filibuster, pass the Equality Act, and send it to President Biden's desk.**
Let me put it simply: it's the filibuster or LGBTQIA+ equality. I am counting on you to join me and our movement in choosing equality.
[**We can't let the filibuster get in the way of this much-needed legislation for another day. Contribute $3 or more today toward our mid-month goal of $10,000, so our movement has the resources to keep pushing for an end to the filibuster and the passage of transformational legislation like the Equality Act.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210614?refcode=em20210614-374&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=374_420207_gSlpYL&akid=374%2E420207%2EgSlpYL)
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210614-374-footer&t=22&refcode2=374_420207_gSlpYL&akid=374%2E420207%2EgSlpYL)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=374%2E420207%2EgSlpYL)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=374%2E420207%2EgSlpYL)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

Arkansas law limits contributions to $5,600 per election cycle. Each individual, political party committee, legislative caucus committee or approved political action committee may contribute up to $2,800 for the primary election and $2,800 for the general election -- for a total of $5,600.
Corporate contributions are not permissible.
Contributions are not tax deductible for Federal income tax purposes. Individuals may take a tax credit on Arkansas tax returns, up to a total of $50 per individual for political contributions made each year.
Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited by law.
State law requires that we collect and report name, address, employer and occupation for each contributor.

They're scared to death that I'll challenge their radical agenda.And believe me, I WILL! They're spending $100,000+ on ads attacking me right at this very moment. And I'm not going to sit back and take it. I put together a $200,000 goal to help fight back and I need your help to get us across the finish line! Can you chip in ASAP to make sure we make it? Thank you, Peter. Together, we can fight back against these out of touch radicals. -Sarah \- - - Forwarded Message Below - - - From: Sarah Huckabee Sanders Subject: ALERT: New attack ad against me To: Peter, I’ve got some urgent and important news: A far-left super PAC run by Hillary, Kamala, and Chuck Schumer's allies have launched an attack ad against me... and they're spending A LOT of money to make sure voters see it. FAR LEFT RADICALS TARGET SARAH HUCKABEE SANDERS WITH $100,000+ AD BUY! We know why they're doing this. They know as governor, I will be a strong defender of freedom and say no to their socialist agenda They know our movement is strong. And they are absolutely terrified of everything coming their way if we succeed. That's why they are coming after me big time... But Peter, I've never backed down before and I won't back down now! I know this ad buy is just the first step. I'm sure they plan on spending even more because these radicals really think that if they spend enough they can defeat us. I won't stand for it. Sarah Huckabee Sanders | | | | Paid for by Sarah for Governor | | PO Box 26340, Little Rock, AR 72221 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | Want to donate a different way? or mail a check: PO Box 26340, Little Rock, AR 72221 Arkansas law limits contributions to $5,600 per election cycle. Each individual, political party committee, legislative caucus committee or approved political action committee may contribute up to $2,800 for the primary election and $2,800 for the general election -- for a total of $5,600. Corporate contributions are not permissible. Contributions are not tax deductible for Federal income tax purposes. Individuals may take a tax credit on Arkansas tax returns, up to a total of $50 per individual for political contributions made each year. Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited by law. State law requires that we collect and report name, address, employer and occupation for each contributor.

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Chicago Mayor’s Office Confirms Racially Discriminatory Interview Policy in Sworn Court Filing
body:
Judicial Watch announced that a new federal court filing by Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot confirms that her office engaged in a two-day “press tour” involving six interviews that was “exclusively” limited to “journalists of color.”

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Jun 14, 2021

### [Chicago Lawyers Say Lightfoot Only Discriminated Against White Reporters For Two Days ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55937&L=25137&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvY2hpY2Fnby1tYXlvci10d28tZGF5cy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNjE0MjM0MjQz) The Daily Caller Attorneys for Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot are arguing that a preliminary injunction against her for racial discrimination is unnecessary because she only racially discriminated against reporters for a strict two-day period.

Lightfoot is being sued by the Daily Caller News Foundation (DCNF) and Judicial Watch for not granting an interview to DCNF reporter Thomas Catenacci, who is white. In their most recent court filing, Lightfoot’s attorneys state that her policy of only granting interviews to journalists of color was in place for a specific two-day window, and therefore their request for a preliminary injunction is moot. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced that a new federal court filing by Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot confirms that her office engaged in a two-day “press tour” involving six interviews that was “exclusively” limited to “journalists of color.” | | | Because no one is above the law! | Jun 14, 2021 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | = | = Judicial Watch filed the lawsuit after Catenacci, a white journalist, emailed Mayor Lightfoot’s office requesting a one-on-one interview with the mayor. The office never replied to the request or to two additional follow-up emails from Catenacci. Catenacci’s request came on one of the days that the mayor admittedly was discriminating based on race. = ---|--- | | | | | “We don’t trust either the Biden administration or the Deep State to voluntarily come clean on COVID and its possible connections to the Wuhan Institute,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “Judicial Watch’s FOIA lawsuits could be the key to unraveling the truth about COVID and the Wuhan Institute.” ---|--- | | | | | In January 2020 New York Governor Andrew Cuomo’s administration was reported to have “confirmed thousands more nursing home residents died of COVID-19 than the state’s official tallies had previously acknowledged,” and according to New York Attorney General Letitia James, “the nursing home death count could be off by about 50%.” ---|--- | | | | = | = Judicial Watch has long been at the forefront of the fight for election reform, battling to clean up voter rolls and informing the public about threats to the integrity of the electoral system. Today, clashes over election laws are raging in state legislatures and Congress. The fight is often ugly, with cries from the Left of a new “Jim Crow” regime—the laws that suppressed and segregated Blacks in the aftermath of the Civil War—echoing across the land. = ---|--- | | | The Daily Caller Attorneys for Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot are arguing that a preliminary injunction against her for racial discrimination is unnecessary because she only racially discriminated against reporters for a strict two-day period. Lightfoot is being sued by the Daily Caller News Foundation (DCNF) and Judicial Watch for not granting an interview to DCNF reporter Thomas Catenacci, who is white. In their most recent court filing, Lightfoot’s attorneys state that her policy of only granting interviews to journalists of color was in place for a specific two-day window, and therefore their request for a preliminary injunction is moot. = The Washington Times Scientists have learned a great deal about the coronavirus, including how it transmits and attacks the body and crucially, how to treat patients and create seemingly effective vaccines. However, scientists are requesting more information that they say is necessary to determine how COVID-19 originated and became a pandemic in order to develop strategies to prevent such a pandemic from ever again visiting such destruction upon humanity. But to this day, Dr. Fauci and NIAID have steadfastly refused to release documents that would help answer this and many other important questions. = CNS News Babbitt was shot and killed by an unidentified Capitol police officer as she, reportedly, was climbing through a broken interior window outside the Speaker’s Lobby off of the House Floor. She was unarmed, and a 14-year Air Force Veteran. = = = = = = | CLIPS = == | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved == |

name: Byron Donalds
subject: I’m a threat to the Left’s narrative.

body:
I'm their worst nightmare

************
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=25756da9198d48ae87251b483dad4777&_e=ijLFtm_s3A_-8FVv9nhZvmKNSAHT8mrgwSPmPbNl3lMXu6f_QH6pPwBtjJWFR3ip6Av648xCu2jcOGjdwk4QYNT8yNCkDMTg-C-xAV4_fCwb12ykk5e0v0fZX3dpwRspHUp-PmwMh1IuRWM3--ksNXlN-OyWq13m5GvaHq_1zn84wM80RHtvuy3aRRY26EAdBEJTUbLavs_LyhL6Uy-UUC_3ScVbPKOzP-_aFUkAn8Fg1M2C4Juflm8Qyk0FoUoGJUHSvxAI9JORPp7xWogILLocNcCm8EFLfpWzbI_I_-mbmBU_Zr9BOo-9YtXMb_LMYxECmGVba9k2EtefyUAN7l995-smPNzNq-qVY8P9B-oMjVWXX9yxwzv11UcXk343Gl-uMrW_sY-K4TZXvJ-BJWiRc7xlh-Nl3M6Rq4ebSsK5lqaxNmYCncumF_BKN0EyqC_R3m26-idIHiKSC1q18htLABSdX74KbBazZ7ZIvgI4o5vop6YBnYu4eYLOphENSRiJunJ7e6v81cZh0TI_rw%3D%3D)

I love my country.
I am a proud Christian.
I am a proud Conservative.
I am a proud Floridian.
I am a proud black man.
I am a proud Trump-endorsed Congressman.

**And I am a threat to the Left 's narrative.**
_
In fact, I 'm their worst nightmare. _So much so that they just voted to keep me out of the Congressional Black Caucus because I don't share their "values."

But you and I know it's because they're afraid of principled America First black conservatives. They will do everything in their power to tear us down because _I am everything they don 't want in Congress._

**The Left will never stop attacking me because I do not subscribe to their Radical Agenda.[_And that 's why I need YOU. _](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=25756da9198d48ae87251b483dad4777&_e=ijLFtm_s3A_-8FVv9nhZvmKNSAHT8mrgwSPmPbNl3lMXu6f_QH6pPwBtjJWFR3ip6Av648xCu2jcOGjdwk4QYNT8yNCkDMTg-C-xAV4_fCwb12ykk5e0v0fZX3dpwRspHUp-PmwMh1IuRWM3--ksNXlN-OyWq13m5GvaHq_1zn84wM80RHtvuy3aRRY26EAdBEJTUbLavs_LyhL6Uy-UUC_3ScVbPKOzP-_aFUkAn8Fg1M2C4Juflm8Qyk0FoUoGJUHSvxAI9JORPp7xWogILLocNcCm8EFLfpWzbI_I_-mbmBU_Zr9BOo-9YtXMb_LMcjNaEAPP49Tcjf8PmpXTLeP7Y0eHFRQm7B-bwftae1jX7tdF2cx1aVdmYcWEIbGfPhUxp5J2nQdB-dwYeTVdmk_zL-E2llvvczim7_H0I9NH1qvkSzskhafYODI4jcwSdH_fbg63xf6bgzDkuZAtRMKbcGwX2ocBqwOuxBlT3lyFbhiklkjHHpHNUlFDPHpB0u-yOP413bR5wV2N49hfRw%3D%3D)**

**We need 12,000 Patriots to stand up to the Left 's bigotry. **[**_Can I count on YOU to be one of them? Without your support we will never FIRE PELOSI and restore Trump 's America First agenda._**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=25756da9198d48ae87251b483dad4777&_e=ijLFtm_s3A_-8FVv9nhZvmKNSAHT8mrgwSPmPbNl3lMXu6f_QH6pPwBtjJWFR3ip6Av648xCu2jcOGjdwk4QYNT8yNCkDMTg-C-xAV4_fCwb12ykk5e0v0fZX3dpwRspHUp-PmwMh1IuRWM3--ksNXlN-OyWq13m5GvaHq_1zn84wM80RHtvuy3aRRY26EAdBEJTUbLavs_LyhL6Uy-UUC_3ScVbPKOzP-_aFUkAn8Fg1M2C4Juflm8Qyk0FoUoGJUHSvxAI9JORPp7xWogILLocNcCm8EFLfpWzbI_I_-mbmBU_Zr9BOo-9YtXMb_LMi1gwCCOItEmxpyGd2Ln2TCnaUmO9E4G4Wi9CHhcAQxFrvsodaW-ruhzumvdjHsuN31NxYyOfTnaGJWshpdhMHC4boSZ45ZrV5QqsnQPan3H9WnDBoiUlfdS9xI8c5gfzKla8ORCeDfQqwGTJvR4WbuZNOZZ_jYXseRn0gGrUJpmR3ShjynWe9vw5m1_dnY4rJDu6cv8vQTl9rrDCOJbbPQ%3D%3D)

The Democrats don't see a place for people like me in their America. They are more interested in scoring political points than making real, commonsense reform that improves the lives of hard-working Americans.

The Left is OBLIVIOUS to the diversity and strength of our conservative movement, Fellow Conservative. [**Can you donate just $12 by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to show Nancy Pelosi black conservatives are here to stay? **](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=25756da9198d48ae87251b483dad4777&_e=ijLFtm_s3A_-8FVv9nhZvmKNSAHT8mrgwSPmPbNl3lMXu6f_QH6pPwBtjJWFR3ip6Av648xCu2jcOGjdwk4QYNT8yNCkDMTg-C-xAV4_fCwb12ykk5e0v0fZX3dpwRspHUp-PmwMh1IuRWM3--ksNXlN-OyWq13m5GvaHq_1zn84wM80RHtvuy3aRRY26EAdBEJTUbLavs_LyhL6Uy-UUC_3ScVbPKOzP-_aFUkAn8Fg1M2C4Juflm8Qyk0FoUoGJUHSvxAI9JORPp7xWogILLocNcCm8EFLfpWzbI_I_-mbmBU_Zr9BOo-9YtXMb_LMcwgIm86LQ_dw4hLszZxrsH1jm4aNvexTI0KSw0oEh-8kKAqOSTfjyaCyKQEfOi7UCYzF-bNL9Zw_WAAFtB8yqoHs3nqEUV94CEMFfny_1dsuntPS0jqYKr1KOd1c3NeXvppPfYzr9e8VKOhHmLsy-FMJSJPX3tOcBDf5CzwdLp7FnxmAj2GhrjG9Xw_DlBrwdffnnB4SsA8B0EXsMgl7oA%3D%3D)

Thank you,
Byron Donalds
Congressman, FL-19
